🔮《幻 • 幻境探秘》生活营报名正式开始！🧙‍♂️

你是否渴望探索一个充满魔法与神秘的世界？在波德申海滩，我们将穿越幻境，揭开魔法的秘密，寻找隐藏的宝藏！🌊 这将是一场2天1夜的奇幻冒险，不仅有精彩的活动，还有提供交通服务，让你无忧前往！

《幻 • 幻境探秘》生活营详情如下：
日期：2024年9月7日（星期六）至2024年9月8日（星期日）
时间：8:30am（星期六）- 7:00pm（星期日）
地点：波德申海滩🏝️
报名费：RM45（会员）；RM48（非会员）
截止日期：2024年9月6日（星期五）

🔗报名表格链接：https://forms.gle/1nRhHUdKk2wdW7JQ9

让我们一起逃离城市喧嚣，踏上一段专属于我们的奇幻之旅吧！✨

📱王晶莹 016-7211355
📱吴芷莹 018-4066100
📱李诗彦 018-9836260

🔮 Life Camp - ”Fantasy • Explore the Fantasy“ registration is now open! 🧙‍♂️

Are you eager to explore a world filled with magic and mystery? Join us at Port Dickson Beach as we journey through enchanted realms, uncover magical secrets, and search for hidden treasures! 🌊This will be a 2-day, 1-night adventure filled with excitement, with transportation provided to ensure a worry-free journey!

Details of the Life Camp - ”Fantasy • Explore the Fantasy“ is as follow: 
Date: 7th September 2024 (Saturday) to 8th September 2024 (Sunday) 
Time: 8:30 AM (Saturday) - 7:00 PM (Sunday) 
Location: Port Dickson Beach 🏝️ 
Registration Fee: RM45 (Member); RM48 (Non-Member)
Deadline: 6th September 2024 (Friday)

🔗Registration form link: https://forms.gle/1nRhHUdKk2wdW7JQ9

Let’s escape the hustle and bustle of the city and embark on a magical journey that’s all our own! ✨

📩For more information, please contact:
📱Wong Jin Yin 016-7211355
📱Ng Sze Ying 018-4066100
📱Lee Shi Yan 018-9836260

结束了迷宫冒险后的你是不是觉得意犹未尽呢？🧟 是时候开启我们新的征程啦！你准备好迎接更多烧脑又刺激的挑战了吗⁉️🧠

下一章的冒险正悄悄地拉开序幕，神秘的惊喜还在前方等着你哦！📜请诸位持续关注我们的更新，一起踏上这场激动人心的新旅程，携手揭开这片全新的世界，抢先体验即将到来的惊喜与挑战，共同迎接更多的精彩瞬间吧！🛸✨

After completing the labyrinth adventure,would you like to carry on exploring now?🧟 It’s time to embark on our next adventure! Are you ready for more thrilling and mind-numbing challenges⁉️🧠

The next exciting phase of your journey is about to begin, and unexpected surprises are still in store for you up ahead! 📜Please keep an eye out for our updates, set off on this thrilling new adventure with us, explore the unknown together, face the difficulties and surprises that lie ahead, and welcome more amazing times spent together!🛸✨

🌟 父亲节快乐！ 🌟

从孩提时代到成年，他一直是家庭中的支柱。无论遇到什么困难，他总是默默地站在家人身后，提供无尽的支持和爱。他的智慧、耐心和无私的付出，教会了孩子们如何坚强和勇敢面对生活中的挑战。

今天是属于他的日子，我们想对他说一声：“谢谢！” 谢谢他教会孩子们如何面对生活中的风风雨雨，感谢他在孩子们迷茫时给予的指导，更感激他在孩子们成功时分享的喜悦。希望今天他能感受到家人满满的爱与感激，愿他健康快乐，每一天都充满幸福。

在此多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会向所有伟大的父亲们致以最诚挚的祝福。在这个父亲节，希望每个人都能珍惜与家人相聚的时刻，感受到浓浓的亲情与关怀，共享欢乐与美好。

🌟 Happy Father’s Day! 🌟

From childhood to maturity, he has been the family‘s pillar. Regardless of the hardships, he stands quietly behind his loved ones, offering unending support and love. His wisdom, kindness, and unselfish dedication instilled in the children the fortitude and confidence to face life’s problems.

Today is his wonderful day, and we would like to say ”thank you!“ Thank you for teaching children how to weather life‘s storms, for guiding them when they got lost, and for celebrating with them when they succeeded. We hope that today he feels the entire family’s love and appreciation. Wishes him health, happiness, and joy every day.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our heartfelt wishes to all the amazing fathers out there. On this Father‘s Day, we hope everyone can cherish the time spent with their families, feel the deep love and care, and enjoy wonderful moments together.

📣重要宣布！重要宣布！ 密室逃脱《囚嬲》的早鸟票正式开售！！！ 
📣今日起限量发售，先到先得。绝对让你物超所值！ 

密室逃脱《囚嬲》活动详情如下：
🗓日期： 
大众开放：16/11/2024（星期六）- 17/11/2024 (星期日) 
外校开放：23/11/2024（星期六）- 24/11/2024 (星期日) 
🕙时间：10am - 10pm 
📍地点：多媒体大学（赛城）

我们将为你带来以两种不同视角作为开端的密室：《镜像禁锢》与《以爱之名》。有趣的剧情设计及烧脑的解密环节，将给你带来一场难忘的沉浸式体验！ 欢迎大家趁着优惠价格加入我们，一同揭晓密室里究竟发生了什么吧！ 🔎

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSccwh6UYtDxQZ_SmtG6CS6cuz3vQuzDeH9AY7OxiKBoQM6saA/viewform?usp=pp_url

📣Attention!  Attention!  Early bird tickets for the Escape Room are now available!!!!  
📣We will be selling early bird tickets today on a first-come-first-served basis! It's definitely a great value for your money!  

Escape Room "Abyss" Event Details: 
🗓Date: 
Public Open Session: 16/11/2024（Saturday）- 17/11/2024 (Sunday) 
External University Open Session: 23/11/2024（Saturday）- 24/11/2024 (Sunday) 
🕙Time: 10am - 10pm 
📍Venue: Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)

We have two different escape rooms, <Mirror Imprisonment> and <By the Name of Love>, each starting from the perspectives of different genders. With intriguing storylines and mind-bending puzzles, these rooms offer an immersive experience that varies depending on your chosen viewpoint! Join us to uncover the mysteries concealed within these rooms, and don't miss out on the early bird discount!🔎 

Registration Link🔗:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSccwh6UYtDxQZ_SmtG6CS6cuz3vQuzDeH9AY7OxiKBoQM6saA/viewform?usp=pp_url

🫧 Gan Yunee 018-2027177 
🫧 Lee Bing You 011-13377137 
🫧 Lee Siew Fang 011-10648189 
🫧Thineshkumar A/L Siva Kumar 011-28530480

一束花落在掌心，一抹新绿爬上枝头，清明是一段被春色轻轻托起的时分🌿。空气带着微湿的温度，草木悄然舒展，思念也随之变得柔软，不再沉重，在四月里悄然发芽🌱，带着淡淡的光和暖。

古人言：“清明时节雨纷纷”，出自杜牧《清明》，写的是天色亦是心境🌫️。雨意未至，山色已新，记忆随着风缓缓铺开，在枝叶之间，在行走之间，缓缓归于心底。名字不必反复提起，情感自有回声，清浅却绵长🍃。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此致意：愿你于此时节，见山是春，念人如常🌼；把温柔留给过往，把热爱交给此刻，让脚步继续向前，让心意始终有光✨。

A flower rests gently in the palm, while fresh green quietly emerges along the branches. Qingming comes as a moment gently lifted by spring 🌿. The air carries a slight hint of moisture as nature awakens at its own pace. Thoughts of remembrance grow gentler in this season, no longer heavy, quietly taking root in April 🌱 with a soft sense of warmth and light.

As the old verse by Du Mu goes, “Drizzling rain falls like tears on the Mourning Day", reflecting both the weather and the state of the heart 🌫️. Even before the rain arrives, the mountains are already renewed. Memories drift with the breeze, settling into the quietest place deep within us. Names do not need to be spoken often, as feelings remain and echo softly over time 🍃.

Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our warm regards. May you, in this season, feel life quietly flourishing all around, while those you hold dear remain gently present in your heart as always 🌼; may you leave your gentleness with the past, place your passion in the present, continue moving forward, and carry a steady light within ✨.

🌟 想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想让大学生活留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来加入！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要协助外务副主席处理华会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待来访校园的外校学生团体
* 协助宣传华文学会的各项精彩活动
* 参与其他院校的活动，与更多人交流互动

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 乐于社交，喜欢与人沟通
* 想认识更多朋友（说不定还能遇见特别的人哦！）
* 希望累积活动经验，提升组织与沟通能力
* 或者只是想让大学生活多一点不一样的体验

🌟 Do you want to meet like-minded friends and create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?
Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the Chinese Language Society’s external affairs, including:
- Hosting visiting student groups from other universities
- Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society
- Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
- Students who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
- Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
- Those eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational and communication skills
- Or students who simply want to add some excitement to their university life

No matter whether you fit the traits above or not, everyone is welcome to join us!

Don’t hesitate—click the link below to fill out the form and create amazing memories with the External Affairs Division!

🐎✨ 马年大吉 · 万事奔腾 ✨🐎

金马迎春，万象更新。
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会
衷心祝愿大家在马年里：
如骏马奔腾，勇往直前；
学业进步，事业顺利；
心想事成，万事胜意。

愿新的一年里，我们携手同行，
传承中华文化，
共创更加精彩的未来。

🐎✨ The Golden Horse welcomes the spring, ushering in new beginnings. ✨🐎

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)
sincerely wishes everyone in the Year of the Horse:
to gallop forward with courage;
to achieve excellence in both studies and career;
and to see all dreams come true.

May we continue to move forward together in the new year,
preserve Chinese culture,
and create an even brighter future.

🌙✨ 开斋节快乐 · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

今天的空气，好像比平常多了一点香味。人们换上新衣，餐桌逐渐摆满佳肴，一句句“Maaf Zahir dan Batin”在手机讯息与笑声之间悄悄传递，团聚的气息也慢慢地铺满每一个角落。

一个月的修行与沉淀，让人学会耐心与温柔，也更懂得宽恕与珍惜。开斋节不只是庆祝斋戒的结束，更提醒我们带着澄澈的心重新出发，把不开心清零，把藏在心里的爱勇敢说出口。

在这充满灯火与欢笑的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会衷心祝愿大家回家有灯火相迎，餐桌有佳肴相伴，身边有笑声相随。愿你今年吃得满足、笑得真诚、爱得坦荡。

🌙✨ Happy Eid al-Fitr · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

Today, the air seems to carry a little more fragrance than usual. People put on new clothes, tables fill with festive dishes, and the greeting “Maaf Zahir dan Batin” is shared through messages and laughter as the joy of reunion slowly spreads everywhere.

After a month of reflection and devotion, Eid reminds us to move forward with patience, kindness, and forgiveness — to let go of what weighs on our hearts and to express the love we often keep unspoken.

On this joyful occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes everyone a home filled with warmth, laughter, and togetherness. May you eat well, laugh sincerely, and love wholeheartedly.

🌟 想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想让大学生活留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来加入！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要协助外务副主席处理华会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待来访校园的外校学生团体
* 协助宣传华文学会的各项精彩活动
* 参与其他院校的活动，与更多人交流互动

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 乐于社交，喜欢与人沟通
* 想认识更多朋友（说不定还能遇见特别的人哦！）
* 希望累积活动经验，提升组织与沟通能力
* 或者只是想让大学生活多一点不一样的体验

不论你是否符合以上条件，我们都欢迎你的加入！

🌟 Do you want to meet like-minded friends and create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?
Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the Chinese Language Society’s external affairs, including:
- Hosting visiting student groups from other universities
- Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society
- Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
- Students who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
- Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
- Those eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational and communication skills
- Or students who simply want to add some excitement to their university life

No matter whether you fit the traits above or not, everyone is welcome to join us!

Don’t hesitate—click the link below to fill out the form and create amazing memories with the External Affairs Division!

🌙✨ 开斋节快乐 · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

今天的空气，好像比平常多了一点香味。人们换上新衣，餐桌逐渐摆满佳肴，一句句“Maaf Zahir dan Batin”在手机讯息与笑声之间悄悄传递，团聚的气息也慢慢地铺满每一个角落。

一个月的修行与沉淀，让人学会耐心与温柔，也更懂得宽恕与珍惜。开斋节不只是庆祝斋戒的结束，更提醒我们带着澄澈的心重新出发，把不开心清零，把藏在心里的爱勇敢说出口。

在这充满灯火与欢笑的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会衷心祝愿大家回家有灯火相迎，餐桌有佳肴相伴，身边有笑声相随。愿你今年吃得满足、笑得真诚、爱得坦荡。

🌙✨ Happy Eid al-Fitr · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

Today, the air seems to carry a little more fragrance than usual. People put on new clothes, tables fill with festive dishes, and the greeting “Maaf Zahir dan Batin” is shared through messages and laughter as the joy of reunion slowly spreads everywhere.

After a month of reflection and devotion, Eid reminds us to move forward with patience, kindness, and forgiveness — to let go of what weighs on our hearts and to express the love we often keep unspoken.

On this joyful occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes everyone a home filled with warmth, laughter, and togetherness. May you eat well, laugh sincerely, and love wholeheartedly.

🌕 冬至快乐 ❄️ 

期末再忙，生活再赶， 冬至还是值得慢下来的一天。 
也许是在宿舍和朋友一起吃一碗汤圆， 也许是隔着电话和家人聊几句近况， 这一天提醒我们的不只是节气， 更是一种“有人惦记，有人团圆”的感觉。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在这个冬至， 祝大家身体安好、学业顺利。不管身在何处，都能感受到属于自己的那一份温暖。冬至时分，也别忘了好好照顾自己。

🌕 Happy Winter Solstice ❄️

No matter how busy the semester may be, Winter Solstice is still a day worth slowing down for.
It may be a simple moment shared with friends in the dormitory, or a brief phone call to catch up with family. More than just a solar term, this day reminds us of being remembered, and of togetherness.

On this Winter Solstice, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone good health and academic success. Wherever you may be, may you feel warmth and care, and may we remember to take good care of ourselves.

On this joyful occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes everyone a home filled with warmth, laughter, and togetherness. May you eat well, laugh sincerely, and love wholeheartedly.

致：全体会员们💖

也希望大家继续给予即将展开的新一届华文学会同样的鼓励与支持。来年我们将推出更多精彩丰富的活动，期待与大家再次相见与参与🙆
谢谢大家！✨

Have you ever wondered— how fragile trust can be?
A single word, a choice, or even a glance is enough to turn trust into a sharp blade.

In “Trustedge”, an immersive mystery × role-playing journey, everyone carries their own “blade”: some protect, some doubt, and some hurt others without realising it.
When trust begins to break, which side will you choose to stand on?

The 28th External Affairs Division of MMU (Cyberjaya) invites you to enter the world of the  Inter-University Interaction Day: “Trustedge”. You will experience tests of trust and the impact of your choices, and you may find new connections and possibilities through both conflict and teamwork.

🇲🇾 Selamat Hari Malaysia 🌺

9月16日，我们迎来了第62个马来西亚日。

它不仅是一个历史时刻，更是一份提醒：不论来自东马 🏞️ 还是西马 🌇，不论种族、语言与信仰 👫🌏，我们都共同编织着属于马来西亚的故事 📜。

让我们继续携手守护这片多元与和谐的土地 🌳，一同迈向更加团结、进步与繁荣的未来 🚀🌟。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此祝福全体马来西亚人民：
马来西亚日快乐 🇲🇾 愿国泰民安 🕊️，人民安康 💖！

🇲🇾 Happy Malaysia Day 🌺

16th September, we celebrate the 62nd Malaysia Day.

Malaysia Day is more than just a historic event — it is a reminder that regardless of East Malaysia 🏞️ or West Malaysia 🌇, of race, language, or faith 👫🌏, we all share the same Malaysian identity and future📜.

May we continue to uphold unity, harmony, and diversity 🌳 as we journey towards a stronger and more prosperous nation 🚀✨.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a very Happy Malaysia Day 🇲🇾💖!

🇲🇾 国庆日快乐！ 🎉

辉煌六十八载，马来西亚走过了风雨与挑战，却始终以团结的力量、坚韧的精神，书写属于我们的光辉篇章。✨

在这值得铭记的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨向全体国人致以崇高的敬意与祝福。愿大马继续稳步前行，繁荣昌盛，让国旗在世世代代的守护下，永远高高飘扬！🇲🇾

🇲🇾 Happy Independence Day! 🎉

For 68 glorious years, Malaysia has weathered challenges and embraced triumphs, forging ahead with unity, resilience, and unwavering spirit. ✨

On this day of remembrance and celebration, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our heartfelt respect and best wishes to all Malaysians. May our beloved nation continue to prosper, and may the Jalur Gemilang fly proudly for generations to come! 🇲🇾

🇲🇾 Selamat Hari Malaysia 🌺

9月16日，我们迎来了第62个马来西亚日。

它不仅是一个历史时刻，更是一份提醒：不论来自东马 🏞️ 还是西马 🌇，不论种族、语言与信仰 👫🌏，我们都共同编织着属于马来西亚的故事 📜。

让我们继续携手守护这片多元与和谐的土地 🌳，一同迈向更加团结、进步与繁荣的未来 🚀🌟。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此祝福全体马来西亚人民：
马来西亚日快乐 🇲🇾 愿国泰民安 🕊️，人民安康 💖！

🇲🇾 Happy Malaysia Day 🌺

16th September, we celebrate the 62nd Malaysia Day.

Malaysia Day is more than just a historic event — it is a reminder that regardless of East Malaysia 🏞️ or West Malaysia 🌇, of race, language, or faith 👫🌏, we all share the same Malaysian identity and future📜.

May we continue to uphold unity, harmony, and diversity 🌳 as we journey towards a stronger and more prosperous nation 🚀✨.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a very Happy Malaysia Day 🇲🇾💖!

🇲🇾 国庆日快乐！ 🎉

辉煌六十八载，马来西亚走过了风雨与挑战，却始终以团结的力量、坚韧的精神，书写属于我们的光辉篇章。✨

在这值得铭记的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨向全体国人致以崇高的敬意与祝福。愿大马继续稳步前行，繁荣昌盛，让国旗在世世代代的守护下，永远高高飘扬！🇲🇾

🇲🇾 Happy Independence Day! 🎉

For 68 glorious years, Malaysia has weathered challenges and embraced triumphs, forging ahead with unity, resilience, and unwavering spirit. ✨

On this day of remembrance and celebration, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our heartfelt respect and best wishes to all Malaysians. May our beloved nation continue to prosper, and may the Jalur Gemilang fly proudly for generations to come! 🇲🇾

二十八啦！🎉
不是岁月让我们老去，而是青春让我们一直闪亮。✨

二十八年来，华文学会陪伴一批又一批的小伙伴，从懵懂到勇敢，从相遇到并肩。这里有笑声，有汗水，有一起疯狂的日子，也有彼此支持的瞬间。💪

28 岁，对我们来说，不是结束，而是新的开始。🔥
未来，还有更多故事等着我们去创造！🚀

生日快乐，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会！🎂
让青春继续发光，让热爱永远燃烧！❤️

We're 28! 🎉
It's not the years that define us, but the passion that keeps us shining. ✨

For 28 years, the Chinese Language Society has been a place where strangers become teammates, where laughter mixes with sweat, and where every crazy moment becomes an unforgettable memory. 💪

28 isn't the end—it's the start of a brand-new chapter. 🔥
The future is wide open, and we're ready to create more stories together! 🚀

Happy 28th Birthday, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)! 🎂
Here's to endless youth, endless passion, and endless possibilities! ❤️

想让你的创意化为现实？
想为校园增添一份文化色彩与青春活力？
机会来了！✨

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会现正式开放特别活动计划书招收！
无论是文化活动、学术讲座、艺术展演或社会关怀，只要你有想法、有热情，我们都欢迎你的提案！💡

🎯 我们期待的，是：
让校园更温暖的活动、
让文化更鲜活的点子、
让每个成员都能发光的舞台。

📌【招收详情】
🗓️ 提交日期：即日起至 11月23日
📍 提交方式：发送至官方电邮 cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
📄 提交内容：活动简介、目标、预算、时间线等
📬计划书面试时间：26/11/2025 - 28/11/2025
📅活动筹备期：2024年12月至2025年5月

📢 [2026 Special Event Proposal Submission is Now Open!] 📢

Want to turn your creativity into reality?
Want to bring cultural vibrancy and youthful energy to our campus?
Here’s your chance! ✨

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) is now officially open for Special Event Proposal Submissions!
Whether it’s a cultural event, academic seminar, artistic performance, or community outreach — as long as you have ideas and passion, we welcome your proposal! 💡

🎯 We’re looking for:
Events that bring warmth to our campus,

👔父亲节快乐💙
在岁月的长河中，父亲的爱如山般沉稳，不言不语，却始终是我们最坚实的依靠。他以肩膀撑起一个家，以沉默诠释深沉的情感。

在这个感恩的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会向天下所有父亲献上最诚挚的祝福：
愿每一位父亲健康平安，笑容常在；
愿子女的成长与感恩，成为他们最骄傲的回报。

谢谢您——用一生诠释责任与担当，
在我们心中，您永远是最伟大的英雄。🛠️💖

👔Happy Father’s Day💙
He may not always speak his love, but a father‘s care is steady like a mountain — silent, strong, and unwavering. He carries the weight of the family on his shoulders, expressing love through quiet dedication.

On this day of gratitude, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our heartfelt wishes to all fathers:
May every father be blessed with health, peace, and lasting happiness.
May the growth and gratitude of their children become their greatest pride.

Thank you—for a lifetime of strength, sacrifice, and silent love.
In our hearts, you will always be the greatest hero. 🛠️💖

🍙 粽子不粘牙，好运天天粘

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会祝大家端午节快乐，心意安康，“粽”享幸福！

🎋 Happy Dragon Boat Festival! 🐉

As the scent of bamboo leaves fills the air, we welcome a festival wrapped in tradition, culture, and care.

The dumplings we enjoy aren’t just filled with glutinous rice — they’re filled with stories, warmth, and love.
The dragon boats don’t just race on water — they carry the spirit of unity, strength, and perseverance.

On this special day, we wish you:
🌿 Peace in your heart, even when life gets busy
🍙 Dumplings that stick (just like good luck!)
💚 Sweetness in your days, even without dessert

Take a moment to slow down and enjoy the traditions that bring us together. CLS MMU (Cyberjaya) wishing you joy, health, and a peaceful Dragon Boat Festival!

二十八啦！🎉
不是岁月让我们老去，而是青春让我们一直闪亮。✨

二十八年来，华文学会陪伴一批又一批的小伙伴，从懵懂到勇敢，从相遇到并肩。这里有笑声，有汗水，有一起疯狂的日子，也有彼此支持的瞬间。💪

28 岁，对我们来说，不是结束，而是新的开始。🔥
未来，还有更多故事等着我们去创造！🚀

生日快乐，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会！🎂
让青春继续发光，让热爱永远燃烧！❤️

We're 28! 🎉
It's not the years that define us, but the passion that keeps us shining. ✨

For 28 years, the Chinese Language Society has been a place where strangers become teammates, where laughter mixes with sweat, and where every crazy moment becomes an unforgettable memory. 💪

28 isn't the end—it's the start of a brand-new chapter. 🔥
The future is wide open, and we're ready to create more stories together! 🚀

Happy 28th Birthday, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)! 🎂
Here's to endless youth, endless passion, and endless possibilities! ❤️

🇲🇾 Selamat Hari Malaysia 🌺

9月16日，我们迎来了第62个马来西亚日。

它不仅是一个历史时刻，更是一份提醒：不论来自东马 🏞️ 还是西马 🌇，不论种族、语言与信仰 👫🌏，我们都共同编织着属于马来西亚的故事 📜。

让我们继续携手守护这片多元与和谐的土地 🌳，一同迈向更加团结、进步与繁荣的未来 🚀🌟。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此祝福全体马来西亚人民：
马来西亚日快乐 🇲🇾 愿国泰民安 🕊️，人民安康 💖！

🇲🇾 Happy Malaysia Day 🌺

16th September, we celebrate the 62nd Malaysia Day.

Malaysia Day is more than just a historic event — it is a reminder that regardless of East Malaysia 🏞️ or West Malaysia 🌇, of race, language, or faith 👫🌏, we all share the same Malaysian identity and future📜.

May we continue to uphold unity, harmony, and diversity 🌳 as we journey towards a stronger and more prosperous nation 🚀✨.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a very Happy Malaysia Day 🇲🇾💖!

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨祝愿大家——卫塞节快乐，愿你我皆得清净安宁，智慧常在。

Vesak Day marks the birth, enlightenment, and passing of Lord Buddha —a sacred occasion symbolizing peace, compassion, and spiritual awakening.On this meaningful day,let us embrace kindness, reflect inwardly, and practice goodwill. 🕯️

The Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes you a joyful and serene Vesak Day.May your heart be filled with light, wisdom, and tranquility.

🪷 Happy Vesak Day 🪷

Vesak Day marks the birth, enlightenment, and passing of Lord Buddha —a sacred occasion symbolizing peace, compassion, and spiritual awakening.On this meaningful day,let us embrace kindness, reflect inwardly, and practice goodwill. 🕯️

The Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes you a joyful and serene Vesak Day.May your heart be filled with light, wisdom, and tranquility.

母亲节🌷致敬平凡中的伟大🌷

母亲，是世界上最温柔且坚韧的角色。✨她们用岁月诠释无私，以行动守护家庭。母爱无需华丽辞藻，它早已深深植于我们生命的点滴之中。

在这特别的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨向全天下的母亲致以最崇高的敬意与谢意。🥰

愿所有母亲健康平安、笑容常在，岁月温柔待你，正如你温柔待我们。

💓母亲节快乐💓 

Mother’s Day🌷Honouring Greatness in the Ordinary🌷

A mother embodies both gentleness and strength. ✨ Through time, she teaches us selflessness,and through quiet sacrifice, she holds families together. Motherly love needs no grand declaration, it is found in every small moment, every silent act of care.

On this meaningful occasion, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends its deepest respect and gratitude to all mothers.🥰

May all mothers be blessed with good health, lasting joy,and the warmth they have so selflessly given to others.

💓Happy Mother’s Day💓

🌸 清明节 | Qingming Festival 🌿

清明时节，微风拂面，仿佛诉说着遥远的思念。在这片春意盎然的天地中，微风带来的不仅是花草的芳香，更是对逝去亲人的深情牵挂。每一次风的轻拂，都是一段回忆的呢喃，是心中那份永不褪色的情感。 

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此于清明节献上最真挚的祝福。愿思念化作温柔的风，传达我们的敬意与缅怀；愿记忆如新芽般永远鲜活，带来无尽的希望与力量。 

During the Qingming Festival, the gentle breeze brushing against your face feels like a whisper of longing. Amidst the vibrant renewal of spring, the breeze carries not only the fragrance of blossoms and grass but also the enduring affection for those who have departed. Every touch of the wind is like a soft murmur of memories, a tribute to love that time can never fade. 

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends sincerest wishes this Qingming Festival. May our remembrance be carried by the gentle wind, conveying our respect and longing. May our memories remain evergreen, bringing endless hope and strength.

🌸 清明节 | Qingming Festival 🌿

清明时节，微风拂面，仿佛诉说着遥远的思念。在这片春意盎然的天地中，微风带来的不仅是花草的芳香，更是对逝去亲人的深情牵挂。每一次风的轻拂，都是一段回忆的呢喃，是心中那份永不褪色的情感。 

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此于清明节献上最真挚的祝福。愿思念化作温柔的风，传达我们的敬意与缅怀；愿记忆如新芽般永远鲜活，带来无尽的希望与力量。 

During the Qingming Festival, the gentle breeze brushing against your face feels like a whisper of longing. Amidst the vibrant renewal of spring, the breeze carries not only the fragrance of blossoms and grass but also the enduring affection for those who have departed. Every touch of the wind is like a soft murmur of memories, a tribute to love that time can never fade. 

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends sincerest wishes this Qingming Festival. May our remembrance be carried by the gentle wind, conveying our respect and longing. May our memories remain evergreen, bringing endless hope and strength.

✨开斋节快乐！🌙💫

开斋节象征着内心的净化、重生与希望的绽放。在这充满感恩与宽恕的日子里，我们真诚祝愿大家与家人团聚，共享喜悦与温暖。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿和谐与幸福伴随在你们左右，愿爱与包容的精神延续在每一个日子里。无论身处何地，我们的祝福始终与你同在。💖🌼

✨Happy Eid al-Fitr! 🌙💫

Eid al-Fitr symbolizes inner purification, renewal, and the blossoming of hope. On this day filled with gratitude and forgiveness, we sincerely wish everyone a joyous reunion with your loved ones, sharing happiness and warmth.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes that harmony and happiness stay with you always, and may the spirit of love and compassion continue throughout each day. No matter where you are, our blessings are always with you. 💖🌼

✨🌸 大宝森节快乐! 🌸✨

大宝森节是一个象征信仰、奉献与精神升华的节日。每一年，我们都会看到虔诚的信徒怀着感恩之心，通过祈福、游行以及各种传统仪式来表达对神明的敬意。在这个特别的日子里，我们不仅见证了宗教的力量，也感受到文化多样性所带来的美好与和谐。 

让我们一同庆祝大宝森节，尊重与欣赏彼此的文化，传递爱与希望。多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿大家在这充满祝福的时节中收获平安、健康与幸福，心想事成！ 

✨🌸 Happy Thaipusam! 🌸✨

Thaipusam is a festival that symbolizes devotion, faith, and spiritual renewal. Every year, we witness devoted worshippers offering prayers, participating in processions, and performing rituals to express gratitude to the deities. This sacred celebration not only highlights the power of faith but also showcases the beauty of cultural diversity and unity. 

Let us come together to celebrate Thaipusam with respect and appreciation for one another‘s traditions, spreading love and positivity. Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishing everyone peace, good health, and happiness this festive season!

✨🌸 大宝森节快乐! 🌸✨

大宝森节是一个象征信仰、奉献与精神升华的节日。每一年，我们都会看到虔诚的信徒怀着感恩之心，通过祈福、游行以及各种传统仪式来表达对神明的敬意。在这个特别的日子里，我们不仅见证了宗教的力量，也感受到文化多样性所带来的美好与和谐。 

让我们一同庆祝大宝森节，尊重与欣赏彼此的文化，传递爱与希望。多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿大家在这充满祝福的时节中收获平安、健康与幸福，心想事成！ 

✨🌸 Happy Thaipusam! 🌸✨

Thaipusam is a festival that symbolizes devotion, faith, and spiritual renewal. Every year, we witness devoted worshippers offering prayers, participating in processions, and performing rituals to express gratitude to the deities. This sacred celebration not only highlights the power of faith but also showcases the beauty of cultural diversity and unity. 

Let us come together to celebrate Thaipusam with respect and appreciation for one another‘s traditions, spreading love and positivity. Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishing everyone peace, good health, and happiness this festive season!

✨开斋节快乐！🌙💫

开斋节象征着内心的净化、重生与希望的绽放。在这充满感恩与宽恕的日子里，我们真诚祝愿大家与家人团聚，共享喜悦与温暖。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿和谐与幸福伴随在你们左右，愿爱与包容的精神延续在每一个日子里。无论身处何地，我们的祝福始终与你同在。💖🌼

✨Happy Eid al-Fitr! 🌙💫

Eid al-Fitr symbolizes inner purification, renewal, and the blossoming of hope. On this day filled with gratitude and forgiveness, we sincerely wish everyone a joyous reunion with your loved ones, sharing happiness and warmth.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes that harmony and happiness stay with you always, and may the spirit of love and compassion continue throughout each day. No matter where you are, our blessings are always with you. 💖🌼

✨捕捉春节之美，共享节日喜悦！✨

农历新年即将到来，诚邀您参与”新春摄影比赛”！用您的镜头记录属于农历新年的美好瞬间，无论是充满故事感的人物，还是洋溢节日气氛的景色，都期待您的精彩呈现！

📅开放时间：2025年1月23日（星期四）至 2025年2月13日（星期四）
📤提交方式：请将参赛作品及作品简介上传至指定的Google Form
🔗链接：https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯摄影主题：农历新年
作品可以是生动的人物，温馨的家庭团聚，或节日气息浓郁的风景等，主题不限，只需传递浓郁的新春氛围即可！

📷用镜头讲述新春故事，期待您的作品大放异彩！

✨ Capture the Beauty of the New Year and Share the Festive Joy!✨

As the Lunar New Year approaches, we warmly invite you to participate in the Extravaganza “Serpent”- Lunar New Year Spring Festival Photography Contest!🏮 Use your lens to capture the wonderful moments of the Lunar New Year, whether it’s storytelling portraits or festive scenery, we look forward to your outstanding entries!

📅Submission Period: 23rd January 2025 (Thursday) to 13th February 2025 (Thursday)
📤Submission Method: Please upload your entry and a brief description of your work via the designated Google Form.
🔗Link:https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯Photography Theme: Lunar New Year
Your work can feature dynamic portraits, warm family reunions or scenery filled with festive vibes. There are no restrictions on the theme, as long as it conveys a rich Lunar New Year atmosphere!

📷Tell your New Year story through your lens, and we look forward to seeing your outstanding work!

🌟 你想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想要在大学生活中留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要是协助外务副主席处理学会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待访问校园的外校学生团体
* 宣传华文学会的精彩活动
* 参与其他学校的活动，与更多人建立联系

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 热爱社交，喜欢与人交流
* 想认识更多朋友（也许还能遇见命中注定的人哦！）
* 渴望积累活动经验，提升组织能力
* 或者只是觉得无聊，想给大学生活增添点不一样的色彩
不管你有没有以上特征，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，让我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩故事吧！
🔗 报名链接： https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ 报名截止日期： 10/2/2025 （星期一）

☎️ 欲知更多详情，请联络： 
龚睛荔 011-60798623

🌟 Do you want to meet more friends? Want to create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you to join!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the society’s external affairs, including:
* Hosting visiting student groups from other universities.
* Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society.
* Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people.

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
* Those who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
* Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
* Students eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational skills
* Or simply those who feel bored and want to add some excitement to their university life!
No matter if you fit the above traits or not, we welcome everyone to join us!

Don‘t hesitate anymore—click the link below to fill out the form and create an amazing story with the External Affairs Division!

⏰ Registration deadline: 10th February 2025 (Monday)

✨捕捉春节之美，共享节日喜悦！✨

农历新年即将到来，诚邀您参与”新春摄影比赛”！用您的镜头记录属于农历新年的美好瞬间，无论是充满故事感的人物，还是洋溢节日气氛的景色，都期待您的精彩呈现！

📅开放时间：2025年1月23日（星期四）至 2025年2月13日（星期四）
📤提交方式：请将参赛作品及作品简介上传至指定的Google Form
🔗链接：https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯摄影主题：农历新年
作品可以是生动的人物，温馨的家庭团聚，或节日气息浓郁的风景等，主题不限，只需传递浓郁的新春氛围即可！

📷用镜头讲述新春故事，期待您的作品大放异彩！

✨ Capture the Beauty of the New Year and Share the Festive Joy!✨

As the Lunar New Year approaches, we warmly invite you to participate in the Extravaganza “Serpent”- Lunar New Year Spring Festival Photography Contest!🏮 Use your lens to capture the wonderful moments of the Lunar New Year, whether it’s storytelling portraits or festive scenery, we look forward to your outstanding entries!

📅Submission Period: 23rd January 2025 (Thursday) to 13th February 2025 (Thursday)
📤Submission Method: Please upload your entry and a brief description of your work via the designated Google Form.
🔗Link:https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯Photography Theme: Lunar New Year
Your work can feature dynamic portraits, warm family reunions or scenery filled with festive vibes. There are no restrictions on the theme, as long as it conveys a rich Lunar New Year atmosphere!

📷Tell your New Year story through your lens, and we look forward to seeing your outstanding work!

五一劳动节⚡向每一份辛勤付出致敬🫡

🌟 你想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想要在大学生活中留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要是协助外务副主席处理学会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待访问校园的外校学生团体
* 宣传华文学会的精彩活动
* 参与其他学校的活动，与更多人建立联系

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 热爱社交，喜欢与人交流
* 想认识更多朋友（也许还能遇见命中注定的人哦！）
* 渴望积累活动经验，提升组织能力
* 或者只是觉得无聊，想给大学生活增添点不一样的色彩
不管你有没有以上特征，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，让我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩故事吧！
🔗 报名链接： https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ 报名截止日期： 10/2/2025 （星期一）

龚睛荔 011-60798623

🌟 Do you want to meet more friends? Want to create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you to join!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the society’s external affairs, including:
* Hosting visiting student groups from other universities.
* Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society.
* Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people.

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
* Those who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
* Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
* Students eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational skills
* Or simply those who feel bored and want to add some excitement to their university life!
No matter if you fit the above traits or not, we welcome everyone to join us!

Don‘t hesitate anymore—click the link below to fill out the form and create an amazing story with the External Affairs Division!

🌟 你想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想要在大学生活中留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要是协助外务副主席处理学会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待访问校园的外校学生团体
* 宣传华文学会的精彩活动
* 参与其他学校的活动，与更多人建立联系

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 热爱社交，喜欢与人交流
* 想认识更多朋友（也许还能遇见命中注定的人哦！）
* 渴望积累活动经验，提升组织能力
* 或者只是觉得无聊，想给大学生活增添点不一样的色彩
不管你有没有以上特征，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，让我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩故事吧！
🔗 报名链接： https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ 报名截止日期： 10/2/2025 （星期一）

龚睛荔 011-60798623

🌟 Do you want to meet more friends? Want to create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you to join!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the society’s external affairs, including:
* Hosting visiting student groups from other universities.
* Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society.
* Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people.

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
* Those who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
* Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
* Students eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational skills
* Or simply those who feel bored and want to add some excitement to their university life!
No matter if you fit the above traits or not, we welcome everyone to join us!

Don‘t hesitate anymore—click the link below to fill out the form and create an amazing story with the External Affairs Division!
🔗 Registration link: https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ Registration deadline: 10th February 2025 (Monday)

Keng Jing Li 011-60798623

✨捕捉春节之美，共享节日喜悦！✨

农历新年即将到来，诚邀您参与”新春摄影比赛”！用您的镜头记录属于农历新年的美好瞬间，无论是充满故事感的人物，还是洋溢节日气氛的景色，都期待您的精彩呈现！

📅开放时间：2025年1月23日（星期四）至 2025年2月13日（星期四）
📤提交方式：请将参赛作品及作品简介上传至指定的Google Form
🔗链接：https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯摄影主题：农历新年
作品可以是生动的人物，温馨的家庭团聚，或节日气息浓郁的风景等，主题不限，只需传递浓郁的新春氛围即可！

📷用镜头讲述新春故事，期待您的作品大放异彩！

✨ Capture the Beauty of the New Year and Share the Festive Joy!✨

As the Lunar New Year approaches, we warmly invite you to participate in the Extravaganza “Serpent”- Lunar New Year Spring Festival Photography Contest!🏮 Use your lens to capture the wonderful moments of the Lunar New Year, whether it’s storytelling portraits or festive scenery, we look forward to your outstanding entries!

📅Submission Period: 23rd January 2025 (Thursday) to 13th February 2025 (Thursday)
📤Submission Method: Please upload your entry and a brief description of your work via the designated Google Form.
🔗Link:https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯Photography Theme: Lunar New Year
Your work can feature dynamic portraits, warm family reunions or scenery filled with festive vibes. There are no restrictions on the theme, as long as it conveys a rich Lunar New Year atmosphere!

📷Tell your New Year story through your lens, and we look forward to seeing your outstanding work!

中秋节🥮🎑
中秋节起源于古代中国，最初是为了庆祝丰收和祭拜月亮。相传后羿射日后，他的妻子嫦娥因吞下仙丹飞上月宫，成为节日的神话背景。此节日象征团圆，月饼则起源于元朝时传递起义信息的习俗。中秋节以月亮、团圆和思念亲人为核心，是团聚和感恩的传统节日。🧑‍🧑‍🧒

中秋节不仅是赏月的时刻，更是阖家团圆、共享美好时光的节日。在这个特别的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会祝愿大家花好月圆，阖家幸福，中秋快乐！🌕🥮

Mid-Autumn Festival 🥮🎑
The Mid-Autumn Festival originated in ancient China, initially celebrated for the harvest and worship of the moon. According to legend, after Houyi shot down the suns, his wife Chang’e swallowed the elixir of immortality and ascended to the moon, becoming the mythological background of the festival. This festival symbolizes reunion, while mooncakes trace back to the Yuan dynasty, when they were used to pass secret messages for rebellion. The Mid-Autumn Festival centers around the moon, family reunions, and longing for loved ones, making it a time for togetherness and gratitude. 🧑‍🧑‍🧒

The Mid-Autumn Festival is not only a time for moon-gazing but also for family reunions and sharing precious moments. On this special day, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone a joyful Mid-Autumn Festival, with full moon blessings and happiness for your family! 🌕🥮

屠妖节，又称为灯节，是印度教的重要节日，象征着光明战胜黑暗、善良战胜邪恶。在这个节日里，人们点亮油灯，装饰家园，庆祝新的一年即将到来。

屠妖节不仅是庆祝光明的时刻，更是让我们反思自我、传递爱与希望的时刻。在这个节日里，我们点亮了心中的灯火，祈愿未来的每一天都能充满温暖与幸福。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝贺大家屠妖节快乐！让我们团聚在亲朋好友的身边，共享丰盛的美食与美味的点心。愿每一个人都能感受到这份浓浓的节日氛围。

Deepavali, also known as the Festival of Lights, is an important celebration in Hinduism, symbolizing the victory of light over darkness and good over evil. During this festival, people light oil lamps, decorate their homes, and celebrate the arrival of a new year.

Deepavali is not only a time for celebrating light but also an opportunity for self-reflection and the sharing of love and hope. During this festival, we ignite the light within our hearts, wishing for every day to be filled with warmth and happiness.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone a Happy Deepavali! Let us gather with family and friends to share a bountiful feast and delicious treats. May everyone feel the warmth of this festive spirit!

Selamat Hari Malaysia！🇲🇾🌺
马来西亚日是纪念1963年9月16日马来西亚联邦成立的重要日子。这一天，马来亚联合邦、沙巴、砂拉越和新加坡联合组成了马来西亚（虽然新加坡于1965年退出）。相比1957年的独立日，马来西亚日更侧重于东马和西马的联合。自2010年起，马来西亚日成为全国公共假期，象征着全国的团结与多元文化的融合。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝福所有马来西亚人马来西亚日快乐！🇲🇾

Malaysia Day commemorates the formation of the Malaysian Federation on 16th September 1963. On this day, the Federation of Malaya, Sabah, Sarawak, and Singapore came together to form Malaysia (Singapore left in 1965). Malaysia Day focuses more on the union between East and West Malaysia compared to the Independence Day. Since 2010, Malaysia Day has been a national public holiday, symbolizing national unity and the fusion of diverse cultures.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a Happy Malaysia Day!🇲🇾

国庆日🇲🇾
马来西亚国庆日，又称“国庆日”或“独立日”，是为了纪念马来亚（现为马来西亚的一部分）于1957年8月31日从英国殖民统治中独立的重要节日。今年是马来西亚独立第67年，第67年的独立不仅仅是对过去的回顾，更是对未来的展望。让我们继续弘扬团结、多元、包容的精神，携手创造更加繁荣和谐美好的马来西亚。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝福所有的马来西亚人国庆日快乐！在这特别的日子里，让我们一起庆祝马来西亚的独立与繁荣。让我们携手共创更加美好的未来，为这个充满希望的国家而自豪！

National Day 🇲🇾Malaysia‘s National Day, also known as ”Hari Merdeka“ or ”Independence Day,“ commemorates the day when Malaya (now part of Malaysia) gained independence from British colonial rule on 31st August 1957. This year marks the 67th anniversary of Malaysia’s independence—a moment not just to reflect on the past but also to look forward to the future. Let us continue to embrace the spirit of unity, diversity, and inclusiveness as we strive together to build a more prosperous and harmonious Malaysia.
Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a Happy National Day! On this special day, let us celebrate Malaysia’s independence and progress together. Let us work hand in hand to create a brighter future and be proud of this hopeful nation!

“为什么你每次硬硬要讲我！”
“我觉得It's the time。”
“为了学会......”

“咔。”
“祝你生日快乐，祝你生日快乐......"

不知不觉间，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会已经走过了二十七个年头。这二十七年的旅程中，我们见证了无数青涩少年蜕变为坚毅的成人，珍藏了许多关于青春的回忆与成长的故事。虽然在人生的旅途上难免会有争执和不和，但最重要的是，在这些争执之后，大家依旧愿意彼此珍惜，共同前行。

在此，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会诚挚感谢所有一路陪伴我们的会员们，正是你们的支持与包容，让学会在每一个风雨过后的日子里更加坚定。

让我们继续携手并肩，迎接未来的每一个光辉岁月！
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会，二十七岁生日快乐！

"You always insist on arguing with me!"
"I think it's the time."
"For the society..."

Click.

"Happy Birthday to you, Happy Birthday to you..."

In the blink of an eye, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) has turned twenty-seven. Over these twenty-seven years, we have witnessed countless young members grow from inexperienced youths into resilient adults, treasuring many memories of youth and stories of growth along the way. Though conflicts and disagreements are inevitable in life, what matters most is that, after these disputes, we are still willing to cherish each other and move forward together.

On this occasion, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely thanks all the members who have accompanied us on this journey. Your support and understanding have made society stronger and more radiant after every storm.

Let us continue to stand together, ready to embrace every bright future that lies ahead!
Happy 27th Birthday, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)!

🚀 Build a Document-Aware AI: LangChain RAG Workshop
Move beyond basic chatbots. Join this hands-on workshop to build an Agentic RAG pipeline—creating AI that "reads" your data and reasons through complex queries with precision.

📅 Essential Details
Date: 8th April
Location: Agmo Space
Who: Exclusive for MMU Students (Basic Python recommended)
Cost: FREE (Refreshments provided)
Workshop level: Beginner to intermediate 

🛠 What You’ll Master
* LangChain & Gemini 3 Flash: Setting up professional-grade AI tools.
* Vector Databases: Using FAISS to turn text into searchable data.
* Agentic Reasoning: Teaching AI to "decide" when to use its own knowledge vs. your data.
* Structured Output: Ensuring citations and confidence scores.

🛤️ Your AI Engineering Roadmap
We won't just leave you with an introduction. At the end of our session, you'll receive a step-by-step roadmap to transition into AI Engineering. Our workshop notebook also includes a curated list of top-tier courses and materials to keep your momentum going.

⚙️ Requirement & Pre-Setup
Bring: Laptop + Google Account.

🔗 Luma registration link : https://luma.com/jj5cgrkl

Don’t just use AI, build it. See you there!

🚀 Automation with n8n Workshop @ DATAi
Learn how to automate tasks, streamline processes, and build powerful workflows using n8n, one of the leading open-source automation platforms.

This workshop is designed for beginners who want to understand automation through practical, hands-on experience. You’ll get to build real workflows while learning how to integrate tools and automate everyday tasks.

What You’ll Learn:
✨ Core concepts of workflow automation
✨ How to set up and use n8n
✨ Building automated workflows with a visual interface (no heavy coding needed)
✨ Practical examples: productivity, data processing, notifications, and more
✨ Running n8n with Docker and accessing it securely using Cloudflared

Before the Workshop:
•⁠ ⁠Participants will receive a setup guide with instructions to:
•⁠ ⁠Install Docker & Cloudflared
•⁠ ⁠Prepare their environment so n8n is ready to run
(We recommend completing the setup before attending to get the most out of the hands-on session.)

Speakers:
👩‍💻 Hannah — Ex-Intern @ LEAD
👨‍💻 Nareen — Ex-Data Science & AI Engineering Intern @ Juara Partners

Event Details:
📅 8 December 2025
🕗 8:00 PM
📍 AGMO Space, FCM
🍪 Refreshments provided

Join us and start building your first automated workflow with n8n!

Fitness Week has officially come to an end, and what a week it was! From intense challenges to unforgettable moments, everyone gave their all and truly embraced the spirit of pushing past limits.

We witnessed amazing strength, solid teamwork, and plenty of personal breakthroughs. Whether you joined for fun, fitness, or fierce competition — you made it count.

More than RM1200 in cash prizes will be awarded to the top challengers who stood out above the rest. Stay tuned — winner announcement coming in the next post!

Dear MMU Chess Club Legends,

Hold onto your knights and bishops, because our weekly chess extravaganza is charging back onto the MMU Melaka Campus like a pawn storming to promotion! 🎉 Join us for an evening of brain-tickling moves, epic rivalries, and enough laughter to make even the grumpiest rook crack a smile. 😜

Whether you're a grandmaster-in-the-making or just here to castle your cares away, this is your chance to outwit your pals, meet new chess buddies, and flex those strategic muscles—all for FREE! 💸 Oh, and if chess isn’t your only jam, we’ve got a stash of other board games to keep the fun rolling. 🎲✨

Event Deets (Mark Your Calendars!):

🗓 Date:  3th Sept 2025 (Wednesday)

⏰ Time: 8PM - 10PM

🪧 Venue: MSMR2009, CLC 

Bring your A-game, a sprinkle of humor, and maybe a sneaky gambit or two. We’re ready to see who’ll claim the throne… or at least brag about it until next week! 😎👑

Can’t wait to see you there, plotting world domination one square at a time! 🚀

Cheers,
MMU Chess Club Melaka

P.S. No actual kings will be harmed during this event. 😉

Assalamualaikum w.b.t dan salam sejahtera.

Program Ramadan Sweet Charity 3.0, hasil kerjasama antara Student Lifestyle & Experience (STyLE), Institusi Usrah (IU), Sekretariat Rakan Muda Melaka (SRM), Persatuan Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi (PSCPUH), Netball MMU Melaka, Student College Committee (SCC), Outdoor Activities Recreational and Society (OUTRECS) dan University Peers Group (UPG) telah mula dijalankan pada 30 Mac 2024 yang lalu. Terdapat tiga program yang dijalankan di bawah nama Ramadan Sweet Charity 3.0; Tautan Kasih, Infaq Kasih, dan Singgah Sahur.

Perancangan program pasti penuh dengan cabaran, tetapi dengan sokongan ikhlas daripada organisasi, individu-individu dan masyarakat, kami berjaya mengatasinya. Ahli jawatankuasa Ramadan Sweet Charity 3.0 dengan penuh rasa syukur mengucapkan terima kasih kepada semua penaja dan penyumbang atas peranan penting anda dalam menjayakan Ramadan Sweet Charity 3.0.

Tanpa bantuan anda, program ini tidak akan dapat dijalankan dengan sempurnanya.

Assalamualaikum w.b.t dan salam sejahtera.

Pada 30 Mac 2024, bersamaan 20 Ramadan 1445H, Student Lifestyle & Experience (STyLE) dan sukarelawan seramai 17 orang daripada Sekretariat Rakan Muda Melaka (SRM),Netball MMU Melaka, Student College Committee (SCC) telah berjaya menjalankan program Infaq Kasih di IPD Jasin.

Program ini telah diadakan adalah untuk berkongsi rezeki kepada masyarakat yg kurang berkemampuan bersempena meraikan bulan Ramadan yg barakah ini. Sebanyak 50 kotak infaq telah berjaya diagihkan kepada asnaf dan juga dua kawah bubur lambuk telah berjaya dimasak serta diedarkan kepada masyarakat setempat. Selain itu, program ini juga adalah untuk merapatkan lagi hubungan silaturahim antara komuniti MMU dan pihak IPD Jasin.

Semoga usaha kolektif menerusi program Infaq Kasih ini terus bersinar sebagai suar cahaya dalam kegelapan, menerangi kehidupan mereka yang memerlukan dan memberi inspirasi kepada orang lain untuk menyertai perjalanan mulia ini.

[APPRECIATION POST FOR RELAY FOR LIFE 2025]

Dear all,

The Relay for Life 2025 was successfully held on 23 November 2025 (Sunday) at Taman Tasik Titiwangsa. Relay for Life is National Cancer Society of Malaysia (NCSM) flagship fundraising and awareness event, symbolising the relentless fight against cancer. 

This initiative aligns with our commitment to community engagement, holistic student development, and social responsibility. The objectives of this event are to raise a target fund for the care and support service for B40 cancer patients and to elevate public awareness about cancer prevention and early detection. 

Over 2,000 people took part in the run, including 43 students from MMU Melaka. This partnership between the MMU RoadRunners club and the National Cancer Society of Malaysia marks a significant step in mobilizing youth participation for a major health cause, demonstrating how institutional commitment can translate into tangible community impact.

Thank you!

[RUN FOR PAWS 2025 - VIRTUAL RUN]

Dear all,

MMU RoadRunners Club is proud to announce Run For Paws 2025, a virtual charity run dedicated to supporting animal welfare. This significant initiative is organised in collaboration with Pertubuhan Pencinta Hidupan Melaka (PPHM) and Pertubuhan Kebajikan Jasa Bakti Malaysia (BETTER.MY) and MMUSIC Charity Carnival.

The primary objective is to rally the community to run a combined total of 500 kilometres, in order to raise RM 1000.00 for PPHM. For every kilometre logged by participants, RM 2.00 will be donated to PPHM to support their invaluable work in rescuing, sheltering and caring for animals in need.

值此元旦佳节
马六甲多媒体大学佛学会
恭祝大家
平安喜乐，福慧圆满，元旦快乐 🎉

冬至，是中华传统二十四节气之一。白昼最短、黑夜最长的这一天，人们常通过团聚、吃汤圆来象征圆满与温暖。汤圆“团团圆圆”，不仅是美味的甜点，更承载着对生活的美好祝愿。

今年冬至，MMU佛学会诚邀大家一起来 Tusita House Melaka，参加我们的 冬至搓汤圆活动！一起动手搓汤圆，把满满的祝福揉进每一颗汤圆里。更特别的是，我们将把这些用心制作的汤圆送到 武吉峇汝兒童希望之家，与孩子们分享节日的喜悦与关怀。

不必担心交通问题，我们将提供接送服务，让你可以安心参与，把爱心和温暖传递给更多人。🚗🚗

✨ 活动详情
📅 日期：28/12/2025（星期日）
🕒 时间：上午9:00 - 下午2:30
📍 地点：Tusita House Melaka

1️⃣ 一起在Tusita House Melaka 动手搓汤圆

让我们一起动手搓汤圆，把温暖和爱心送出去，用行动庆祝冬至的团圆与幸福！❤️
除夕，是和家人围坐一桌、聊过去一年故事的夜晚，也是给自己许愿的时刻。多媒体大学马六甲院校佛学会祝大家今晚温暖满满、笑声常在，把旧年的不顺都留给烟花去照亮，新的一年勇敢追梦、闪闪发光✨除夕快乐！

你不是放不下，
只是被“得失”困住了。🌿

在大学里，
我们常常为学业、金钱、时间、关系而焦虑。
看起来很努力，内心却一直在内耗。

很多时候，
这些困扰，其实来自我们对“有 / 无”“得 / 失”的执着。

📖 这一次，我们从 《金刚经》 出发，
一起走进“中道”，重新看待这些问题。

📌 分享班主题
《金刚经》——走进中道

🧠 分享内容：
✨ “空”到底是什么？为什么不是虚无
✨ 如何避免落入“什么都没有”的误解
✨ 什么是“应无所住而生其心”
✨ 面对压力时，如何不被执着困住

💬 互动环节：
你可以带着你的困扰来——
学业 / 人际 / 情绪 / 未来

一起看看：
我们是如何执着在这些问题上的？
有没有新的角度去面对？

🧑‍🏫 活动讲师
常寂法师：法鼓山马来西亚道场常住法师

第二课： 青少年时代

✨在最辉煌的人生里，他却开始思考真正的意义。

从天资聪颖、文武双全，
到一颗愿意守护生命的仁慈之心，
他拥有了很多人一生追求的一切。

但当幸福与富贵都围绕着他时，
他却问了一个更深的问题——
这一切，真的足够吗？

或许，我们也一样。
在忙着追求成绩、成就与认可的同时，
有没有停下来想过：
👉 什么才是真正重要的？

🌱 学会善良，学会思考，
也许比拥有一切更重要。

下一篇，我们一起看看——
 他的人生，为什么开始改变。

新学期，新起点，新团队。我们是马六甲多媒体院校佛学会本届理事，期待和大家一起在校园中学习佛法、交流心得、共同成长。🌟🌟

大家好，我们是弘法租，主要负责策划与主持佛学会分享班，邀请法师与居士带来心灵的启发与智慧。

组员：张全勇

也象征着新希望的开始。

在这团圆温暖的日子里，
多媒体马六甲院校佛学会
祝愿大家——
🍡 冬至安康，身心安稳
🙏 福慧增长，吉祥常伴

愿一碗汤圆，暖身；
愿一份正念，暖心。

2600年前，这位名为“悉达多”的太子一出生就拿到了顶级的人生剧本：
👑 王位继承人、顶级富二代、全国的希望。

所有人都觉得他会成为统一天下的“转轮圣王”，
但他偏不。他选择离开舒适区，去探索生命的真相。

现实生活里，我们是不是也常被贴标签？
“30岁前要买房”、“这份工作才稳妥”、“你应该这样生活”……
悉达多太子的故事告诉我们：哪怕全世界都预言了你的未来，你依然有权选择自己想走的路。 不当国王当佛陀，不是因为他“躺平”，而是因为他找到了更有意义的生命蓝图。🌿

劳动节快乐 🌿
在这个属于付出与耕耘的日子里，
我们也许忙碌、也许疲惫，
但每一分努力，都是生命中不可或缺的累积。

在日复一日的生活里，
愿我们不只是为了完成任务而前行，
也能在每一个当下，保持觉知与专注，
让每一次用心的付出，成为内心成长的养分。

当身体在劳作时，心依然可以安住；
当世界喧嚣时，内心依然可以宁静。
愿你在付出中不失温柔，
在努力中仍有余裕照顾自己，
让生活不只是奔波，也有片刻的安定与自在。

在这个被速度推着走的世界里，
茶，是我们按下暂停键的方式。

所谓的“禅”，不一定要深山古寺，
也不需要刻意寻求——
有时候，它就藏在一杯温热的茶里。

当茶香缓缓升起的那一瞬，
好像所有纷扰都被蒸散了。

你会发现：
热的是水，暖的是手，而安的，是你的心。
人生的答案往往不会在最喧闹的地方出现，
它更像这一杯茶——
需要你放慢、停下来、尝一口、
然后听见一直被忽略的自己。

中秋节，又称“团圆节”，是中华文化中仅次于春节的重要传统节日。它起源于古代祭月、拜月的习俗，后来逐渐演变为人们在农历八月十五这一天，一边赏月一边祈福的美好传统。古人相信月亮象征着圆满与团聚，因此中秋节也承载着人们对家庭和谐、生活美满的祝愿。

在中秋之夜，人们会与家人朋友团聚，共赏一轮明月，品尝象征团圆的月饼。月圆人圆，寄托着人们对亲人的思念与祝福。即使相隔千里，只要抬头望月，也能感受到彼此心意相连。

中秋节不仅是文化传承的节日，更提醒我们要懂得感恩，珍惜家人、朋友与身边的人，常怀慈悲与善念。正如圆满的月亮，愿我们心中也都圆满无缺，彼此关怀，共同营造祥和与喜乐。

 在这温馨的节日里，衷心祝愿大家：
🌸 身心安乐
🌸 阖家团圆
🌸 福慧增长
🌸 中秋节快乐🥮

*你我学佛修行，他却早已在无声中成就慈悲*
从少年不懂事，到成人路难行，
父亲未曾开口谈什么大道理，
却用坚硬的肩膀，挡下世间风雨。

他不善表达爱，却把人生最好的都留给了我们，
父爱如山，是不动声色的深情，
他未曾讲“慈悲”，却日日以身示教，
那一份担当，那一份包容，就是无声的布施与守护。

佛说：知恩报恩，方得圆满。
这一生，我们也许难以回报他的所有付出，
但今天，让我们从一句“爸爸，辛苦了” 开始修行。

愿我们不只在今天想起他，
更在岁月深处常怀感恩。
*愿天下父亲，身心安稳，吉祥自在*

《节日背后的故事》分享班

每年农历七月，你是否也听过这些话？

“鬼门开了，小心点。”😱

“七月半，不宜办喜事。”😨

“不要乱烧纸，会招东西来……”👻

这些禁忌、传说、恐惧，从小就在我们身边流传。

但你可知道，所谓“鬼节”，其实是佛教中充满慈悲与孝道精神的节日：盂兰盆节

🎤 本场分享，你将听见：

🔸 “鬼节”从哪里来？它与盂兰盆节有何关系？

🔸 目连尊者救母的感人故事

🔸 七月，其实是“孝亲月”而非“鬼月”？

🔸 从佛教角度看——面对亡者，我们该恐惧，还是慈悲？

这不是一场吓人的鬼故事，

而是一场关于爱、孝顺与放下的觉醒。

那晚，我们一起走进《破地狱》，
不只是电影，更是一次对传统与信仰的思考。
笑声、讨论与分享，

📸 来重温当日的点滴吧～

🇲🇾1957年8月31日，马来西亚迎来了独立的曙光，从此开启了一个崭新的篇章。

独立日不仅是铭记历史的时刻，更是提醒我们珍惜团结与和平的日子。多元种族、文化与信仰共同孕育了今日的马来西亚，这份和谐正是我们最珍贵的财富💡

🎉 值此国庆佳节，MMU佛学会与大家一同庆祝祖国的生日✨

我们秉持慈悲与智慧的精神，祈愿国土安乐 🕊️、人民安康 💖、社会和谐 🤝。愿国旗高高飘扬，照耀我们的团结；愿善念与欢喜心常存 🌸，护佑马来西亚迈向更繁荣的未来。

让我们以感恩的心 💛，庆祝这份属于全民的荣耀 —— 🎊 国庆快乐，马来西亚万岁！🇲🇾🎇
农历新年，是春回大地、万象更新的时刻，也是与家人团聚、与朋友欢笑的温暖日子。多媒体大学马六甲院校佛学会在此祝福大家，新的一年里心怀喜悦，步步安康，梦想如春芽般生长，生活如红灯笼般温暖明亮。愿你们在新年里收获笑声与幸福，迎接每一个美好的日子。新年快乐，阖家幸福！ 🧨🧨

*你我向佛而行，她却是我们最初的慈悲本源。*

从蹒跚学步，到跌跌撞撞的人生路，
母亲从未教我们如何爱，
却用尽一生诠释了什么是爱。

她未曾讲经说法，
却用一饭一衣、一言一行，教会我们慈悲与忍耐。

佛说，报父母恩，是世间第一难事。
但只要愿意，从一句谢谢开始，
一次陪伴开始，
一颗柔软的心开始，
我们都能在修行的路上，不负这份深恩。
*愿天下母亲，身心安康，福慧圆满。*

端午节，又称端阳节、龙舟节、重五节，是中华民族传统的重要节日之一，定于每年农历五月初五。这一节日的起源众说纷纭，其中最广为流传的说法，是为了纪念战国时期楚国的爱国诗人屈原。

屈原一生忠贞爱国，忠于理想。当国家危难之际，他以死明志，投江殉国。百姓为表达哀思，在江中投粽、划龙舟驱邪，这便形成了端午节吃粽子、赛龙舟的习俗。与此同时，挂艾草、佩香囊、饮雄黄酒等传统做法，也寄托了人们对平安健康的期盼。

时至今日，端午节已不仅是一种纪念，更是一份文化的延续，一种情感的传递。它连接着亲情、传承着习俗，也唤起我们对家国的共鸣。

愿这份粽香，承载的不只是味蕾的满足，更是岁月的温柔和生活的祝福。值此佳节，无论身在何处，都愿你被温柔以待，被幸福环绕。端午至，愿你“粽”有好运，岁岁平安。

多媒体大学马六甲院校（MMU）在此祝各位端午安康，幸福常在。

卫塞节（Wesak Day，也称佛诞日）是全世界佛教徒共同庆祝的重要节日，是为了纪念佛教创始人释迦牟尼佛一生中三大圣事：

👶 诞生于蓝毗尼园 —— 太子一出生便步行七步，宣告“天上天下，唯我独尊”，寓意众生皆具佛性。
🌳 悟道于菩提树下 —— 舍弃世间享乐，佛陀静坐冥思，最终证得正觉，开启智慧之门，慈悲济世。
🌅 涅槃于拘尸那罗 —— 佛陀圆寂之时，安详示现无常，教导众生珍惜因缘，修行正道。

✨ 卫塞节不仅是纪念，更是提醒。
让我们在佛陀的光明指引下，愿众生离苦得乐，世界和平安康。

*祝大家卫塞节快乐🪷*

「悲智双运，谛造祥和」，让慈悲与智慧并行，在祥和中感悟佛法的力量💪。🪷卫塞节是纪念释迦牟尼佛诞生、成道与涅槃的吉祥日子。🔥在这充满意义的节日里，无论您是否是佛教徒，我们都诚邀您与我们一起共同迎接这一庄严殊胜的时刻。✨届时将会有花车游行和浴佛活动，让我们一起感受佛法的光辉与祥和🫶🏻。

[CLSM] 五一国际劳动节是颂扬勤勉，致敬劳动价值的重要日子，旨在肯定社会各界劳动者为文明进步与国家繁荣所做出的卓越贡献。在这一天，人们不仅庆贺劳动的果实，更感悟不懈奋斗的力量。无论是在建设一线、医疗后勤，还是在守护安宁的岗位上，每一份付出都值得被铭记，每一份辛劳都在筑就更美好的未来。

多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华文学会谨此向大家致以诚挚的问候。愿大家在向劳动者 致敬的同时,也能在这个节日里收获片刻的宁静与充实,感受奋斗带来的尊严与成长 的喜悦。

“资讯领航,推广中华文化”

多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] May 1st International Labour Day is a significant occasion to celebrate the spirit of diligence and honour the profound value of work. It serves to recognize the outstanding contributions made by workers from all walks of life toward social progress and national prosperity. On this day, we not only celebrate the fruits of our toil but also reflect on the power of unyielding perseverance. Whether on the frontlines of construction, in healthcare and logistics, or in roles safeguarding peace and security, every contribution is worthy of remembrance, as every effort helps build a brighter future.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its most sincere greetings to all. As we pay tribute to the spirit of hard work, may everyone find moments of peace and fulfilment during this holiday, embracing the dignity and joy of growth that stem from one's endeavours.

"Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture"

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM] 清明节是中华传统文化中重要的节日之一，既是慎终追远、缅怀先人的日子，也是感受春意、亲近自然的时节。在这一天，人们通过祭祖追思、踏青赏春，表达对先人的敬意与怀念，同时体会万物复苏、春意盎然的生命气息。 

值此清明之际，多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向大家致以诚挚的问候。愿大家在追思先人的同时，也珍惜当下，感悟生命的珍贵与传承的意义。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] Qingming Festival, also known as Tomb-Sweeping Day, is an important traditional 
observance in Chinese culture. It is a time for honoring and remembering ancestors while also appreciating the renewal of nature in spring. On this occasion, people pay tribute to their forebears and enjoy spring outings, reflecting both remembrance and the vitality of life.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) wishes everyone a meaningful Qingming Festival. May this occasion be a time for reflection, remembrance, and appreciation of the enduring values of family, heritage, and life.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM] 开斋节（Hari Raya Aidilfitri）是穆斯林在完成斋月（Ramadan）后迎来的重要节日，象征着一个月的自律、虔诚与心灵净化的圆满结束。在这一天，人们通过祈祷、团聚与分享，表达对真主的感恩，并与家人朋友共度温馨时光。

开斋节不仅是庆祝的时刻，更承载着宽恕与和解的意义。人们彼此道歉、互相祝福，在包容与关爱中拉近彼此的距离。这一节日也体现了团结、尊重与多元文化共融的价值，让社会更加和谐与温暖。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有穆斯林同胞致以最诚挚的祝福，愿大家在这个佳节中收获喜悦与平安，愿爱与希望常伴左右，万事顺遂。 🌙

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] Hari Raya Aidilfitri is an important festival celebrated by Muslims following the completion of the holy month of Ramadan. It marks the fulfillment of a month of self-discipline, devotion, and spiritual purification. On this day, people express their gratitude to Allah through prayers, gatherings, and sharing, while cherishing meaningful moments with 
family and friends.

Hari Raya Aidilfitri is not only a time of celebration, but also carries the significance of forgiveness and reconciliation. People seek forgiveness from one another and exchange well wishes, strengthen bonds through compassion and understanding. This festive occasion also reflects the values of unity, respect, and multicultural harmony, contributing to a more 
peaceful and inclusive society.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Muslim community. May this festive season bring you joy and peace, and may love and hope always be with you. Wishing you success and happiness in all that you do. 🌙

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM] 大宝森节是印度教中一项重要而神圣的节日，通常在农历泰月（约公历一月至二月之间）的第一天举行，以纪念印度教 神穆鲁干神（Murugan）的诞辰。

在这一天，信徒们会通过禁食、祈祷及长途跋涉的方式，表达 神明的虔诚与感恩。部分信徒会背负象征奉献的卡瓦迪（Kavadi），或以身体承受考验，展现坚定的信念、忍耐与精神力量。这些仪式不仅是一种宗教实践，也体现了信仰中自律、奉献与内心修行的深刻意义。

大宝森节不仅是宗教庆典，更象征着信念的力量、心灵的净化，以及社群之间的团结与互相尊重。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有印度同胞献上最诚挚的祝福，祝愿大家大宝森节平安喜乐，心愿圆满。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

CLSM] Thaipusam is an important and sacred festival in Hinduism, usually observed on the first day of the Tamil month of Thai (typically falling between January and February in the Gregorian calendar), commemorating the birth of the Hindu deity Lord Murugan.

On this day, devotees express their devotion and gratitude through fasting, prayers, and long-distance pilgrimages. Some devotees carry the Kavadi, a symbolic structure representing devotion, or undergo physical endurance as a demonstration of their strongfaith, perseverance, and spiritual strength. These rituals are not only religious practices but also reflect the values of self-discipline, dedication, and inner spiritual growth within the faith.

Thaipusam is more than a religious celebration; it symbolizes the power of faith, the purification of the soul, and the spirit of unity and mutual respect within the community.

Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Indian community, wishing everyone a peaceful and joyous Thaipusam, and may all your heartfelt wishes be fulfilled.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM] 五一国际劳动节是颂扬勤勉，致敬劳动价值的重要日子，旨在肯定社会各界劳动者为文明进步与国家繁荣所做出的卓越贡献。在这一天，人们不仅庆贺劳动的果实，更感悟不懈奋斗的力量。无论是在建设一线、医疗后勤，还是在守护安宁的岗位上，每一份付出都值得被铭记，每一份辛劳都在筑就更美好的未来。

多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华文学会谨此向大家致以诚挚的问候。愿大家在向劳动者 致敬的同时,也能在这个节日里收获片刻的宁静与充实,感受奋斗带来的尊严与成长 的喜悦。

“资讯领航,推广中华文化”

多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] May 1st International Labour Day is a significant occasion to celebrate the spirit of diligence and honour the profound value of work. It serves to recognize the outstanding contributions made by workers from all walks of life toward social progress and national prosperity. On this day, we not only celebrate the fruits of our toil but also reflect on the power of unyielding perseverance. Whether on the frontlines of construction, in healthcare and logistics, or in roles safeguarding peace and security, every contribution is worthy of remembrance, as every effort helps build a brighter future.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its most sincere greetings to all. As we pay tribute to the spirit of hard work, may everyone find moments of peace and fulfilment during this holiday, embracing the dignity and joy of growth that stem from one's endeavours.

"Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture"

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有印度同胞献上最诚挚的祝福，祝愿大家大宝森节平安喜乐，心愿圆满。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

CLSM] Thaipusam is an important and sacred festival in Hinduism, usually observed on the first day of the Tamil month of Thai (typically falling between January and February in the Gregorian calendar), commemorating the birth of the Hindu deity Lord Murugan.

On this day, devotees express their devotion and gratitude through fasting, prayers, and long-distance pilgrimages. Some devotees carry the Kavadi, a symbolic structure representing devotion, or undergo physical endurance as a demonstration of their strongfaith, perseverance, and spiritual strength. These rituals are not only religious practices but also reflect the values of self-discipline, dedication, and inner spiritual growth within the faith.

Thaipusam is more than a religious celebration; it symbolizes the power of faith, the purification of the soul, and the spirit of unity and mutual respect within the community.

Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Indian community, wishing everyone a peaceful and joyous Thaipusam, and may all your heartfelt wishes be fulfilled.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture.”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) wishes all our Muslim friends a smooth and blessed fasting month. Ramadan Mubarak! 

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

[CLSM] 开斋节（Hari Raya Aidilfitri）是穆斯林在完成斋月（Ramadan）后迎来的重要节日，象征着一个月的自律、虔诚与心灵净化的圆满结束。在这一天，人们通过祈祷、团聚与分享，表达对真主的感恩，并与家人朋友共度温馨时光。

开斋节不仅是庆祝的时刻，更承载着宽恕与和解的意义。人们彼此道歉、互相祝福，在包容与关爱中拉近彼此的距离。这一节日也体现了团结、尊重与多元文化共融的价值，让社会更加和谐与温暖。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有穆斯林同胞致以最诚挚的祝福，愿大家在这个佳节中收获喜悦与平安，愿爱与希望常伴左右，万事顺遂。 🌙

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] Hari Raya Aidilfitri is an important festival celebrated by Muslims following the completion of the holy month of Ramadan. It marks the fulfillment of a month of self-discipline, devotion, and spiritual purification. On this day, people express their gratitude to Allah through prayers, gatherings, and sharing, while cherishing meaningful moments with 
family and friends.

Hari Raya Aidilfitri is not only a time of celebration, but also carries the significance of forgiveness and reconciliation. People seek forgiveness from one another and exchange well wishes, strengthen bonds through compassion and understanding. This festive occasion also reflects the values of unity, respect, and multicultural harmony, contributing to a more 
peaceful and inclusive society.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Muslim community. May this festive season bring you joy and peace, and may love and hope always be with you. Wishing you success and happiness in all that you do. 🌙

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

Whether you are looking to experience the rich flavor of the New Year or simply want to gather with friends, this is a special moment you won’t want to miss!

CNY Celebration 2026: “Zenith” Details:
Date: 4 February 2026 (Wednesday)
Time: 2.00 p.m. – 5.00 p.m.
Venue: Main Hall (Persada Permata Dunia), Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)
Dress Code: Red Attire

We warmly welcome everyone to participate and celebrate this festive season with us. Let’s welcome a hopeful year together!

For further information, kindly contact:
Director: Gan Yik Lei 010-969 6021
Co-Director: Ong Jia Xuan 018-201 1445
Co-Director: See Yee Zhen 011-1439 3134

Thank you.

[CLSM] ❄冬至，是农历十一月的重要传统节日，象征昼短夜长、寒冬渐深，也寓意新一轮生机的开始。自古以来，冬至被视为团圆与感恩的日子，人们吃汤圆、饺子，祭祖祈福，寄托对家人的思念与对来年的祝愿。

值此冬至佳节，让我们一同感受传统文化的温度，传承节日的美好意义。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”
多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十八届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] ❄The Winter Solstice, observed in the 11th lunar month, marks the shortest day and longest night of the year and symbolizes reunion, gratitude, and renewal. With a history spanning thousands of years, traditions such as enjoying dumplings and glutinous rice balls reflect wishes for warmth, unity, and good fortune.

On this special day, let us celebrate our cultural heritage and share the warmth of the season.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”
Regards,
High Committee of 28th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM] 🔔圣诞节是一个充满爱、喜悦与分享的节日。在这个彩灯闪烁、歌声悠扬的季节，不仅是岁末欢聚的时刻，更是人们互相传递祝福、表达感恩的佳节。自古以来，虽然圣诞节源自西方，但在多元文化交融的今天，它已成为我们体验温情、共庆欢乐的重要时刻。

在这个特别的日子里，让我们在闪烁的圣诞树下许下心愿。愿每一份礼物都承载着惊喜，每一声祝福都化作冬日里最炽热的阳光。无论身在校园或家中，愿这份节日的温馨能驱散所有的疲惫。

值此圣诞佳节，让我们一同感受多元文化的魅力，分享节日的喜悦与平安。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化” 
多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会 
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] 🔔Christmas is a season of love, joy, and sharing. As the bells chime and the streets light up with festive decorations, it is a time for heartfelt reunions and expressions of gratitude. While Christmas has its origins in the West, in our diverse society today, it has become a wonderful occasion for us to experience warmth and celebrate together.

On this special day, let us make a wish under the twinkling Christmas tree. May every gift bring a surprise, and every blessing turn into the warmest sunshine in winter. Whether you are on campus or at home, may the festive warmth wash away all your exhaustion.

On this festive occasion, let us celebrate the beauty of cultural diversity and share the joy and peace of the season together.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture” 
Regards, 
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[APPRECIATION POST FOR THE CONFERENCE OF SELF IMPROVEMENT & SELF MASTERY - FSA 2024]

Dear all,

Wing Chun Do Club 2023/2024 and Bazi & Metaphysis Community have successfully executed the Conference of Self Improvement & Self Mastery on 27 January 2024 and 28 January 2024 (Saturday and Sunday), with the initiation to bring MMU students to join as the event crew.

What began as a mere vision evolved into a profound reality, thanks to the collective efforts of the dedicated committee behind the scenes. It is inspiring to witness how a shared vision can transform into a tangible and unforgettable experience for all involved.

Furthermore, the attendance of individuals who embraced the spirit of the occasion. The enthusiastic energy of the participants, and the positive interactions all contributed to the vibrant atmosphere that made the event truly special.

As the conference unfolded, we felt an overwhelming sense of gratitude for stumbling upon this impromptu gathering of minds. The speaker, with his wisdom and insight, had given speeches filled with knowledge, connection, and the reminder that self-improvement is a journey worth embracing. To each committee member, speaker, and attendee, we express our deepest thanks for being an integral part of this unforgettable experience.

We attach herewith the photos of the Conference of Self Improvement & Self Mastery - FSA 2024.

Thank you!

This is an internationalized based event aiming to cultivate self improvement and self mastery. Furthermore, it is structured to guide us through a holistic approach to personal development, encompassing various aspects of our life, including mental, emotional, physical and spiritual well-being. This event is not only a one-size-fits-all solution but is tailored to accommodate your unique goals, aspirations and challenges. Meanwhile, this is a golden opportunity for gaining experiences to organize an international event.

[INTRODUCTION OF MULTIMEDIA UNIVERSITY WING CHUN DO CLUB]

Dear all,

We are excited to introduce the Wing Chun Do Club, a martial arts based club at MMU Melaka, dedicated to the art of Wing Chun.

Wing Chun Do Club's objectives revolve around self-defense, physical fitness, character building, mental well-being, empowerment, personal growth, martial arts ethics, camaraderie, and preservation of the Wing Chun tradition. By adhering to these objectives, the club provides its members with a platform for growth, development, and the perpetuation of the profound art of Wing Chun.

Join us in redefining limits and embracing growth as we cultivate a supportive and inclusive space for all members. Wing Chun Do Club wishes you all the best in discovering the power of Wing Chun and unlocking your potential.

Thank you!

"Redefine Limits, Embrace Growth"

[REBOOT OF MULTIMEDIA UNIVERSITY WING CHUN DO CLUB]

Dear all,

We are thrilled to announce the long-awaited return of the Wing Chun Do Club at MMU Melaka, better and stronger than ever before!

Prepare to immerse yourself in the essence of Wing Chun, a traditional Chinese martial art known for its swift, efficient, and practical combat techniques. With our reboot, we are committed to preserving the authentic teachings while infusing fresh perspectives to meet the demands of modern martial arts. From beginners to advanced practitioners, we welcome all levels to join us on this exhilarating journey of self-discovery and growth.

At Wing Chun Do Club, we believe that a strong community spirit is the key to success. Together, we will foster a supportive and inclusive environment where everyone can learn, share, and inspire one another to reach new heights in their martial arts journey.

Thank you!

✨Our Annual General Meeting is officially wrapped! 🎬
It was a great time to look back at everything we’ve gone through this year😎 — the games, the teamwork and of course all the memories that made both on and off the court！！🫂

The AGM also gave us a chance to reflect, share ideas and talk about how we can keep improving as a club moving forward.💪🌟

Huge appreciation to our outgoing committee for all the hard work and dedication behind the scenes — none of this would be possible without you 🫶 At the same time, welcome to the new committee! 👋
New faces, new energy and fresh ideas — we’re excited for what’s coming next.🌤️

Thank you to everyone who attended and supported the meeting. Let’s keep the momentum going and make this year even bigger and better. More games, more matches and more memories ahead 🔥🏐

Best regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 24/25

Morpheus–OpenClaw Workshop

AI and automation are changing how people work, build, and solve problems. But knowing where to start is often the hardest part.

This workshop gives you that starting point.
Through the OpenClaw Workshop, you’ll hear directly from the community leads at Morpheus (a decentralized AI ecosystem) and learn how it’s reshaping the way people access and use AI.

Instead of relying on traditional paid models, Morpheus introduces concepts like staking tokens to access AI compute, opening up new possibilities for developers and builders. You’ll also see how this can be integrated with tools like OpenClaw to automate workflows and support real-world projects.

No prior experience with OpenClaw or decentralized AI? That’s completely fine. This session is designed to help you explore new skills and understand how these technologies can be applied in practical, everyday contexts.

🎤 Speakers
-Rene F Bernard
-Eric Chan
(Asia Community Leads @ Morpheus)

📅 27 April 2026
 ⏰ 7:00 PM – 9:30 PM
 📍 Agmo Space, FCM, MMU Cyberjaya

✨ What you’ll gain:
 • Introduction to Morpheus & decentralized AI
• Understanding token staking for AI compute
• How OpenClaw integrates with AI workflows
• Real use cases from community leaders
• Networking with like-minded students

🔗 Register: https://luma.com/ao3ija21

Bash & Linux Workshop

Fast. Powerful. Underrated.

Step into the world of Bash & Linux and learn how to navigate, automate, and control your system like a pro.

Whether you’re new or just want to get more comfortable with the terminal, this session will level up your skills.

🎤 Speaker: Izzminhal
📅 Date: 29th April 2026
⏰ Time: 8:00 PM – 10:30 PM
📍 Venue: AGMO Space, Faculty of Creative Multimedia, MMU Cyberjaya

In this session, you’ll get to:
• Understand basic Linux commands
• Navigate your system through the terminal
• Learn useful Bash commands and shortcuts
• Explore how developers actually use the terminal

Once you get it, you won’t want to go back.

Pull up and unlock a whole new way to work!

Register here: https://luma.com/anaa8s6v

LineX Workshop 2026- Day 1 Highlights 🌟

Thank you to everyone who participated and contributed to making the session a meaningful and engaging experience. Your enthusiasm and commitment truly set the tone for the workshop. 🥳

Day 1 of the LineX Workshop focused on hands-on learning in PCB Design and 3D Modelling, where participants had the opportunity to explore fundamental concepts and apply them in practical settings. The session encouraged creativity, problem-solving, and technical exploration. 🔧📏⚙️

We would also like to extend our appreciation to IEM UTeM for the collaboration and continuous support in making this workshop a success. 🙌🏼🤍

Thank you everyone once again and see you in the next workshop! 👋🏼

MMU Engineering Society wishes everyone a very Happy Eid Al-Fitr..✨🌙

Under the glow of the crescent moon, may your hearts be filled with faith, your paths guided with hope, and your days blessed with peace and prosperity...💫

Let this Eid be a reminder to cherish every moment, strengthen our bonds, and continue spreading kindness wherever we go..❤️

We did it! 🏆✨

Proud to share that our Engineering Society has been nominated and emerged as the winner of Best Tech & Innovation Programme 2025 for the X-Change Summit Event at the MMU Awards 2025!

This achievement is more than just a title — it reflects the passion, creativity, and relentless dedication of every single member who made this possible. From late nights to bold ideas, this win belongs to all of you..💡⚙️

Congratulations to the entire team for pushing boundaries and working extremely hard. Here’s to continuing innovation, growth, and making an even bigger impact together..🚀

That’s a wrap for CSRW April 2026! 🎉

A heartfelt welcome to all our new members — we’re excited to have you join the MMU Engineering Society family ⚙️💙

Thank you to everyone who stopped by our booth, supported us, and registered with us. Your enthusiasm truly made this event unforgettable 🙌

Stay tuned for workshops, projects, and amazing experiences ahead 👀✨

It’s a wrap of Day 2 and the final day of the LineX Workshop 2026! 🌟🥳

Thank you to all participants for your active involvement and dedication throughout the sessions. Your effort and teamwork made the workshop both productive and enjoyable. 🤝🏼🎉

Day 2 of the Workshop emphasized hands-on experience in Soldering Techniques and the development of Line-Following robots, followed by a friendly competition. Participants were able to apply their knowledge in a practical environment, reinforcing both technical and collaborative skills.🔧⚙️🦾

We would like to express our sincere gratitude to IEM UTeM for their collaboration and support in bringing this workshop to life. 🙌🏼🤍

Your presence, support, and active participation truly made the session meaningful and successful.
Here’s to a new term filled with growth, collaboration, and exciting opportunities ahead. Let’s make 26/27 an amazing one together! 💪⚙️

Introducing the LINEX Workshop 2026, organized through a collaboration between Multimedia University Melaka and Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka — an immersive two-day programme designed to bring your technical knowledge to life through hands-on learning and real-world applications.

This workshop features hands-on sessions in:
• Printed Circuit Board (PCB) Design
• Soldering Techniques
• 3D Modelling
• Line-Following Robotics, including a Friendly Competition

Participants will benefit from guided learning, collaboration with students from MMU and UTeM, and the opportunity to apply theoretical knowledge in a practical setting.

📍 Venue: MMU Melaka
🗓 Date: 18th – 19th April 2026
🕘 Time: 9:00 A.M. – 6:00 P.M.

Additional benefits include complimentary lunch, transportation from UTeM to MMU, and a certificate of participation.

Kindly note that seats are limited. We encourage early registration to secure your place.

For any inquiries, please contact:
Amelie (+6011-10523060)-> MMU 
Keisavanaath (+6017-8712548)-> MMU
Anushiya (+6011-70179057)-> UTeM

King Sejong Institute MMU Melaka proudly announce that we’re organizing a K-Pop Cover Dance Competition. It’s time for you to uncover your talent and have fun! Join us to win exciting prizes too!!!
 
Date:
16th December 2021
Time:
5 p.m. to 8 p.m.
Venue:
Google Meet (Online)
Registration Dateline:
10th December 2021
Eligibility:
- The contest is open to Malaysian and foreigners residing in Malaysia besides Korean Nationality.
- This a group competition. Must be between 2-5 people.
- Age: More than 15 years old.
How to enter:
1. The song or dance performance video must be produced as a full version of the selected song of your choice OR a medley of K-pop songs (total video time must be at least 3 minutes long, no longer than 5 minutes).
2. Video entry format:
a. Mp4 format only.
b. 720p or higher resolution.
c. Landscape format only.
d. Brighter lighting condition preferred.
e. File name: Your group name
3. Only 1 entry is allowed for 1 group.
Prizes:
1st place: Prizes worth RM 2,000 + medal
2nd place: Prizes worth RM 1,500 + medal
3rd place: Prizes worth RM 1,000 + medal
 
Participation prize: T-shirt (Only for groups that are chosen for final round)
 
Popularity award: Will be based on likes on our King Sejong Institute MMU Melaka Facebook Page
Contest Method:
Preliminary round
▪ Participants need to register through Google Form and submit their cover dance video.
▪ The best 10 groups will be chosen for Final round.
 
Final Round
▪ The same video submitted for the preliminary round will be played during the Final Google Meet session.
▪ The best 3 performances will be chosen as winners.
