As we celebrate the resurrection of our Saviour Jesus Christ, let us be reminded that indeed, 'Nothing is impossible with God'. Just as He said, He rose again and conquered death. No circumstance is too difficult for Him, and no miracle is too hard for Him. 

Let us rejoice and be grateful, that there is hope even after death through the ultimate sacrifice made for us out of love. The resurrection isn’t just a story, it’s a promise. Because Jesus lives, our past is forgiven, our present has purpose, and our future is secure in Him.

1 Corinthians 15:55 - “Where, O death, is your victory? Where, O death, is your sting?”

If God is good, why do we suffer?
Recap & notes from our speaker session 🤍
Huge thanks to Mrs. Christine Michael for such a powerful and eye-opening sharing.✍🏼
Thank you everyone who came.  Take time to reflect, pray, and let God move. ❣️

Week 12, but we still gathered for Bible Surgeon 🩺📖
Grateful for a time to slow down, dive into God’s Word, and reflect together 🤍
Thankful for Lyon for serving as our speaker truly a blessing to this session 💪🏻

Pressing on with strength and grace as the semester continues ✨

Thank you everybody for being part of our Pillow Talk session 🤍
So many amazing testimonies shared, proud of all of you ❣️

Hope you felt safe to reflect, connect with God, and grow together in fellowship and strength.

See you next week! 💪🏻🌙

Thank you to everyone who joined our Boy-Girl Relationships session 🤍

Special thanks to Mr. Lemuel and Mrs. Melanie for sharing their wisdom and reminding us to pursue relationships with intention, boundaries, and Christ at the center.

Here is a short summary of our session. 
We were challenged to :
- reflect on becoming the right person, instead of just trying to find one, 
- value accountability over secrecy 
- recognise red flags and patterns over potential

This is a reminder that singleness is not a lack, but a season of growth. Relationships should never replace what only God can fulfill, but instead should draw us closer to Him ❤️

That's all for now! See you guys very soon for another insightful session! 👀

This is a place where strangers become family,where ordinary days turn into moments we’ll always remember. 🫶🏻
There’s always room for one more, we’d love to have you with us next semester. 🤍

All the best for your exams, you’ve got this 💪✨
Finish strong, then enjoy your well-deserved sem break!☀️

See you soon ♡

[CLSM_YX25] 聚光灯下，雄辩开场！

当“辩论”邂逅“表演”，思想与语言的火花将点燃全场！🔥

迎新活动系列2025 “爻” 之 辩论表演赛，即将震撼登场！这一次，我们不只是辩论。 我们要以舞台的形式，让逻辑与情感共舞，让语言的锋芒在灯光下闪耀。

辩手们蓄势待发，他们将以犀利的思维与饱满的热情，展开一场场唇枪舌剑的思想对决。从理性的推演到情感的碰撞，每一句话、每一个论点，都是智慧的火花。 这不仅是一场比赛，更是一场语言与表演艺术的盛宴。让我们一起走进这场脑力与口才的交响乐，聆听思维的力量，感受辩论的魅力！

🎤诚邀你一同见证辩场的华丽开幕， 用心倾听，用思考回应。
 因为每一个观点，都是闪耀的光！✨

辩论表演赛详情如下：
日期：2025年11月12日 （星期三）
时间：8:00 p.m.
地点：多媒体大学（马六甲院校）综合讲堂 MSMX0002

欲知更多详情，请联络：
关熙翰 010-2007733
颜毓雷 010-9696021
宋正堡 011-10690425

谢谢。

[CLSM_YX25] Under the Spotlight, the Debate Begins!

When debate meets performance, the sparks of thought and language will set the stage ablaze! 🔥

The Orientation Activity Series 2025 ”NOVA“ Debate Showcase is about to make its grand debut! This time, it’s more than just a debate. It’s a performance where logic dances with emotion and the sharp edge of language gleams under the spotlight.

Our debaters are ready with keen intellect and fiery passion, they will engage in a battle of ideas, where every word and every argument bursts with the brilliance of reason. From rational analysis to emotional collision, each exchange reveals the beauty of thought in motion. This is not merely a competition. It‘s a grand celebration of language and the art of expression. Join us in this symphony of intellect and eloquence, and witness the power of ideas unfold before your eyes!

🎤 You are warmly invited to experience the dazzling opening of this debate stage — to listen with your heart, and respond with your mind.
 Because every idea shines with its own light. ✨

Details of the Orientation Debate Exhibition are as follows:
Date: 12 November 2025 (Wednesday)
Time: 8:00 p.m.
Venue: CLC MSMX0002, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

For any inquiries, kindly contact:
Kuan Xi Han: 010-2007733
Gan Yik Lei: 010-9696021
Vince Seong: 011-10690425

Thank You.

[CLSM_YX25] 辩论赛倒数3天 
《缺爱的人 和 不缺爱的人：谁更懂得爱人？》

有人说，缺爱的人更懂得珍惜爱； 也有人认为，不缺爱的人更有能力去爱别人。

那谁才是真正懂得“爱人”的人？

战鼓已响，辩手蓄势待发！ 一场精彩绝伦的思辨盛宴即将拉开序幕。 你，准备好你的耳朵和大脑了吗？

再过 3 天，我们的辩手将登上舞台， 以言语交锋，用思想碰撞， 带你一起探索 ”爱“ 的真谛。

辩论表演赛详情如下：
日期：2025年11月12日 （星期三）
时间：8:00 p.m.
地点：多媒体大学（马六甲院校）综合讲堂 MSMX0002

欲知更多详情，请联络：
关熙翰 010-2007733
颜毓雷 010-9696021
宋正堡 011-10690425

谢谢。

[CLSM_YX25] 3 Days Countdown to Orientation Debate Exhibition 
“Who Truly Understands How To Love : Those Starved Of Love or Those Nurtured By Love?”

Some say that those who lack love cherish it more deeply. Others believe that those who have always been loved are more capable of loving others.
So, who truly understands what it means to love?

The war drums have sounded, and our debaters are ready to take the stage!
A thrilling feast of ideas and eloquence is about to begin.

Are your ears and mind ready?
In just 3 days, our debaters will engage in a battle of words and minds, inviting you to join them in exploring the true essence of love. 

Details of the Orientation Debate Exhibition are as follows:

[CLSM_YX25] 聚光灯下，雄辩开场！

当“辩论”邂逅“表演”，思想与语言的火花将点燃全场！🔥

迎新活动系列2025 “爻” 之 辩论表演赛，即将震撼登场！这一次，我们不只是辩论。 我们要以舞台的形式，让逻辑与情感共舞，让语言的锋芒在灯光下闪耀。

辩手们蓄势待发，他们将以犀利的思维与饱满的热情，展开一场场唇枪舌剑的思想对决。从理性的推演到情感的碰撞，每一句话、每一个论点，都是智慧的火花。 这不仅是一场比赛，更是一场语言与表演艺术的盛宴。让我们一起走进这场脑力与口才的交响乐，聆听思维的力量，感受辩论的魅力！

🎤诚邀你一同见证辩场的华丽开幕， 用心倾听，用思考回应。
 因为每一个观点，都是闪耀的光！✨

Our debaters are ready with keen intellect and fiery passion, they will engage in a battle of ideas, where every word and every argument bursts with the brilliance of reason. From rational analysis to emotional collision, each exchange reveals the beauty of thought in motion. This is not merely a competition. It‘s a grand celebration of language and the art of expression. Join us in this symphony of intellect and eloquence, and witness the power of ideas unfold before your eyes!

[CLSM_CLD25] 华文学会文化文学股将在2022年6月3日至2022年6月5日举办线下为期三天两夜马六甲至槟城的文化之旅。第一天我们将会在马六甲参观沈慕羽书法文物馆。第二天我们将会去槟城参观极乐寺，张弼士故居和槟城老街。第三天我们会在槟城参观以姓氏聚居的姓周桥。我们能够从这些拥有价值的地点更加了解其文化和有趣的历史。有兴趣的伙伴们快来加入我们的文化之旅吧！

47JBjc7MoUMJcuMK8

地点：马六甲和槟城

✨Decode the Challenges, Define your Excellence. ✨ 
Are you ready to be part of our committees for the upcoming 24th N-IVAQ? 

In collaboration with the Malaysian Institute of Accountants (MIA), the Multimedia University Accounting Club Melaka will be organising the 24th National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ) 2026. This event has been proudly hosted by the MMU Accounting Club (Melaka Campus) since 2001.

N-IVAQ is a nationwide competition endorsed by MIA which is open to all Accounting students currently pursuing full-time undergraduate degrees or diploma programmes in universities, colleges, and educational institutions across Malaysia. It serves as a platform for students to apply their accounting knowledge and contributes towards the development of accounting standards in Malaysia.

🎯 The Qualifying Round and Final Round of the 24th N-IVAQ 2026 will be held in May 2026 at Multimedia University Melaka Campus.
We are now recruiting High Committees & Sub Committees for the 24th N-IVAQ 2026.
Available Positions:
- Quiz Protocol
- Public Relations
- Technical
- Programme
- Special Task

Committee involvement enhances students’ understanding of the accounting profession through hands-on experience and collaboration. It also offers an excellent opportunity to connect with accounting bodies and institutions across Malaysia. Most significantly, an MIA endorsed appreciation certificate will be awarded to all committee members.

⏳ Spots are limited, the recruitment form will close on 11th January 2026 (Sunday), 11:59pm.
Further details of the interview will be sent to potential applicants later.

From BPP beginnings nearly 40 years ago, BPP Learning Media has become the benchmark for quality in professional education study materials.

We are proud to present MIA (Malaysian Institute of Accountants) as the co-organizer of the 23rd National Inter-Varsity Accounting Quiz (N-IVAQ)! 🎉

MIA is a statutory body established under the Accountants Act 1967, with a mandate to regulate and develop the accountancy profession in Malaysia in support of nation building.
MIA accords the Chartered Accountant Malaysia or “C.A.(M)” designation. Working closely alongside businesses, MIA connects its membership to a wide range of information and resources, events, professional development and networking opportunities.
Presently, there are more than 40,000 members making their strides in businesses across all industries in Malaysia and around the world.
MIA’s international outlook and connections are reflected in its membership of regional and international professional organisations such as the ASEAN Federation of Accountants (AFA), and the International Federation of Accountants (IFAC).

The MMU Accounting Club (Melaka Campus) sincerely thanks for their commitment and generous support 🤝. It is a privilege to have them on board for this significant event 📚✨.

MMU SRC President Darren John Led 100 Students in Developing a Resolution Supporting Lonjakan: Keunggulan Global Under the Rancangan Pendidikan Tinggi Malaysia (RPTM) at the Makmal & Dialog Kemenjadian Mahasiswa

The session brought together diverse student perspectives to align with Malaysia’s broader goals for global competitiveness in higher education. Under his coordination, the discussion focused on strengthening initiatives that support international exposure, academic standards, and graduate readiness.

The resulting resolution was formally presented to Zambry Abd Kadir, Minister of Higher Education @zambryabdkadir , and Adam Adli Abd Halim, Deputy Minister of Higher Education @adamadli_ , along with senior officials from the Ministry of Higher Education (KPT) @mohe.official . This reflects MMU’s constructive engagement in national-level policy discussions.

This initiative highlights MMU’s continued participation in advancing global aspirations within higher education, while demonstrating collaborative contributions from GLU institutions in supporting Malaysia’s long-term objectives.

Through structured leadership and representation, President Darren John continues to ensure MMU’s voice is present in meaningful conversations shaping the future of higher education in Malaysia.

MMU SRC proudly participated in the Makmal & Dialog Kemenjadian Mahasiswa 🇲🇾

This historic national platform gathered 981 student leaders from Public Universities (IPTA), Private Higher Education Institutions (IPTS), Polytechnics, and Community Colleges — symbolising the collective voice of higher education students across Malaysia.

Through transparent and constructive dialogue, six critical resolutions were presented, addressing graduate employability, cost of living, digitalisation of education, mental well-being, leadership development, and global mobility. These discussions contribute meaningfully to the ongoing development of the Rancangan Pendidikan Tinggi Malaysia (RPTM) and the broader direction of Malaysia’s higher education agenda.

The MMU SRC delegation, headed by President Darren John, represented MMU at the national level and actively contributed to these important conversations.

We extend our sincere appreciation to the Minister of Higher Education, Zambry Abd Kadir @zambryabdkadir , and the Deputy Minister of Higher Education, Adam Adli Abd Halim @adamadli_ , as well as the Ministry of Higher Education (MOHE) @mohe.official , Majlis Perundingan Pelajar Kebangsaan (MPPK) @officialmppk , and Yayasan Perkasa Siswa @perkasasiswa for providing this meaningful platform for student voices to be heard at the national level.

MMU SRC remains firmly committed to nation-building and to representing the voices of MMU students confidently and responsibly in shaping Malaysia’s future.

Sharing the Spirit of Ramadan🌙✨

On 10th March, SRC MMU distributed 100 packs of free food to students and staff for iftar in celebration of the holy month of Ramadan. 

Through this initiative, we hope to share the spirit of generosity, unity, and compassion that Ramadan represents within our campus community.

We would also like to express our appreciation to the Ministry of Higher Education @mohe.official for their support in making initiatives like this possible.

SRC MMU wishes everyone Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri. May this festive season bring joy, peace, and meaningful moments with your loved ones.

Let us continue to uplift one another and remember that even the smallest act of kindness can create a meaningful impact. ✨

Best regards,
Students’ Representative Council

MMU SRC President at Majlis Perundingan Pelajar Kebangsaan (MPPK) Elections 2026/2027 🇲🇾

MMU SRC President Darren John participated in the Majlis Perundingan Pelajar Kebangsaan (MPPK) Elections for the 2026/2027 term, held from 12–14 February 2026. The platform serves as an important national forum that brings together student representatives from across Malaysia to strengthen and elevate the collective student voice at the national level, supported by the Kementerian Pendidikan Tinggi (KPT).

We would like to congratulate President Darren John on his appointment as Eksekutif Media dan Komunikasi Korporat, reflecting continued leadership and active contribution within the national student ecosystem.

We also extend our sincere congratulations to Muhammad Irfan Firdaus Bin Md Fauzi, YDP MPP Universiti Teknologi Malaysia (UTM), on being elected as President of MPPK for the 2026/2027 term.

MMU SRC remains committed to strengthening collaboration between IPTA and IPTS institutions, fostering constructive engagement, and working collectively for the betterment of students and the nation.

We wish the newly elected MPPK leadership a productive and impactful term ahead.

Built Together, Achieved Together ✨

50 achievements.

One term.

Countless memories and milestones along the way.

Throughout the 2024/2025 term, SRC worked together to plan, organise, and deliver initiatives for the student community. 

Each achievement reflects the teamwork, dedication, and effort behind the scenes 🤝

Thank you to everyone who supported, participated, and believed in our journey 💙

As we close this chapter, we wish the next SRC term all the best🌟

🌸✨Throwing it back to the enchanting night of November 29, 2023 our Japanese Club Society's Annual Grand Meeting, it was a night of cultural celebration and shared dreams. From spirited cheers to appointing esteemed High Comms for the Term 23/24, each moment painted a vivid picture of unity. ありがとう to all who joined us! Let's cherish the bonds and promises made, celebrating the AGM that set the stage for a year of camaraderie and cultural brilliance. 🌸✨

📣 Attention Cosplayers of the Japanese Cultural Society~!

👘 We've just released new cosplay guidelines to enhance our cultural events. Please take note of the following rules: 

1️⃣ No NSFW/Revealing/Suggestive Clothing
• Choose characters and costumes that prioritize modesty, aligning with MMU attire guidelines. 

2️⃣ Respectful Costumes
• Ensure your costumes show respect and consideration for cultural sensitivities. 

3️⃣ No Political Costume
• Maintain a neutral and inclusive environment by avoiding overtly political themes. 

4️⃣ Only Cosplay During Japanese Cultural Society Event
• Cosplay is permitted EXCLUSIVELY during Japanese Cultural Society events. 

🎎 Please note that these rules MUST be followed in MMU's campus grounds, but are not applicable for events outside of MMU such as Comic Fiesta, Cos-Mic, and AniManGaki. Though, you will be responsible for your own actions! 

🌸 Let's make our cosplay experiences enjoyable, respectful, and in line with our cultural appreciation. Thank you for your cooperation~!

مبارك عليكم الشهر الفضيل وكل عام وانتم بخير اسأل الله ان يتقبل منا ومنكم صيامنا و قيامنا ، خير الايام هي ايام رمضان فأغتنموها بالعمل الصالح .

ضحكنا، لعبنا، وختمنا الترم بذكريات ما تنسى.

✨ عيدكم مبارك! ✨

يسر نادي الثقافة العربية في MMU ملقا أن يهنئكم بحلول عيد الفطر المبارك. 🌙✨
نسأل الله أن يتقبل منا ومنكم صالح الأعمال، ويعيده علينا وعليكم بالخير واليمن والبركات. 🌿

كل عام وأنتم بخير! 🎉
بمناسبة حلول عيد الأضحى المبارك يتقدَّم بأسمى آيات التهنئة والمباركة نادي الثقافة العربية لافرادها  الكرام، وكم يسعدنا ذلك ويشرفنا أن تقبل هذه التهنئة المتواضعة، وكل عام وأنتم بألف خير

يود النادي العربي الثقافي تهنئتكم بحلول شهر رمضان المبارك، أعاده الله علينا وعليكم بالخير واليمن والبركات. نسأل الله أن يملأ هذا الشهر الكريم بالرحمة والمغفرة، وأن يعيننا على صيامه وقيامه وتلاوة القرآن، وأن يكتب لنا فيه القرب منه والطاعات الخالصة لوجهه الكريم. رمضان كريم عليكم جميعًا، وكل عام وأنتم بخير 🤍🌙

بكل فخر وسرور، يعلن النادي العربي الثقافي في جامعة MMU بفرعها في ملاكا عن أول نشاط له! يوم الأحد الموافق 30 يونيو 2024، نظمنا رحلة ترفيهية مليئة بالمرح والإثارة لطلاب الجامعة. بدأنا اليوم بمغامرة مشوقة في سباق سيارات الكارتينج حيث أظهر الجميع مهاراتهم في القيادة والسرعة. ومن ثم انتقلنا إلى لعبة “ووتر جيل بلاستر” حيث امتلأت الأجواء بالضحك والمرح والندية.

كان يوماً لا يُنسى، مليئاً بالذكريات الرائعة واللحظات الممتعة. نحن متحمسون لتنظيم المزيد من الأنشطة المثيرة في المستقبل، فلا تفوتوا فرص الانضمام إلينا في مغامراتنا القادمة!🌟

With joy, the Arabic Cultural Society at MMU Melaka has finished its first activity! On Sunday, June 30th 2024, ACS organized an entertainment trip full of fun and excitement for the students. We started the day with an adventure in go-karting, where everyone demonstrated their driving and speeding skills. Then we moved on to the Water Gel Blaster game, where the atmosphere was filled with laughter and fun moments.

It was an unforgettable day, full of wonderful memories and fun moments. We are thrilled to organize more exciting activities in the future, so don’t miss out on the opportunities to join us on our next adventure!🌟

From the first kick off to the final whistle, this tournament was nothing short of legendary! 🌍💪 Watch the full event video and experience the intense matches, incredible goals and unforgettable moments that brought international and local students from UTeM & MMU together in the spirit of unity and sportsmanship! 🏅💥

A huge THANK YOU to MyBuddies Club UTeM and Arabic Culture Society MMU for making this event possible and to every player, supporter and volunteer who made it truly special! 🙌💙

Intelligence maker group is proud to announce the fourth workshop for this year "BASICS OF AUTODESK INVENTOR".
WHY INVENTOR IS THE MOST COMMON USE IN ALL OVER THE WORLD?!
It is used for 3D mechanical design, design communication, tooling creation and product simulation in the most simple and comprehend way. This software enables users to produce accurate 3D models to aid in designing, visualizing and simulating products before they are built with ability to check its kinematics and assemble ability.

Date: 14th-15th Sept 2019
Time: 2.00 pm – 7.00 pm
Venue: CLC-Multimedia University 
Participants: 30 Max
Fees: RM 30.00 (student only), RM 50 (non-student)
Certificates provided. .

.
We had a great day at MMU this morning. 🤩 
Honestly, we have such a strong community spirit, it really showed today. #EidMubarak 😍❤️

It was such a fun session! 😍
All study stress melted away the moment stepped onto the field. 😅😁 The playful characteristic of the "little kid" deep down inside everyone of us made us forget our study challenges with one another as we battled each other out. 🔥🔥 We cheered our team mates on from the side lines. We even made jokes about how some of our colleagues should or shouldn't be playing. That only made us laugh even more, thus adding to a light-hearted and relaxed atmosphere. 😂👍 It definitely fostered a high degree of camaraderie amongst us. ❤❤. Check our Facebook page for more Pics🤩 by typing: ‏ ‏ Arabic culture society -MMU Melaka #acs_melaca

MMU Swimming Club is happy to announce that our Lifesaving 101: LSSM Bronze Medallion Certification is open for registration! This is your chance to learn essential lifesaving skills that will earn you a recognized certification 🏊‍♂️🛟

This course includes 4 professional training sessions (6 weeks) and 1 Certification test, conducted by a certified coach.
Whether you’re aiming for lifeguard qualification, water safety skills, or just to level up your swimming, this programme is for you!

Outside, this certification usually costs RM650 to RM1000 —
At MMU, you’re getting it for as low as RM260!
(The cheapest you’ll find in the market!)

⸻

🛟 Pre-requisites:
	•	Able to swim 100m continuously
	•	Able to swim 300m (any stroke)
	•	Able to dive and retrieve an object from a depth of 2m
✅ A pre-requisite test will be conducted on 28 April 2026

⸻

📍 Venue:
MMU Swimming Pool

🕒 Training Sessions:
During MMU Swimming Club members’ swimming sessions.

⸻

🗓️ Last Date to Register:
28 April 2026

💰 Fees:
	•	RM260 (MMU Swimming Club Members)
	•	RM300 (Non-Members)

(Compared to outside — this is a steal!)

Interested? Register now!

WRAP UP 2025 on 2026?

It’s been a year since I started managing this account. When I was assigned as the social media manager of MMUESC, I felt both excited and scared. There were so many unknowns waiting for me to explore — and honestly, I worried that I might get overwhelmed.

But looking back now, I’m proud to have been chosen to manage this page. Being able to read your replies to our Instastories, your reactions, your comments, or even just seeing a simple notification that someone liked our post — all of it makes me feel grateful.

Over the past year, I’ve felt like an observer who got the privilege to witness how our club grew so much throughout 2026. We started the year with UniCup S1 — my first big project — then continued with our MLBB roster, HOK roster, Ebee Cupz, and the most unexpected one: creating our own jersey.

It’s a weird metaphor, but over the past year MMUESC has felt like raising a child — and me, as a newbie parent, guiding it, supporting it, and feeding it with passion and enthusiasm. Watching it grow from a child to a teenager and now finally into an adult.

Now in 2026, we’re still not satisfied. We remember our goal, our vow, and our mission: to gather gamers into a gaming community.

To every gamer out there — if you ever feel tired, alone, or underestimated, we are here. This family is waiting for you.

—HOD in Public Relation, Ethan

In this mou signing with Varsity Esports Alliance (Hereinafter referred to as “VEA” is wholly owned by Team Rey Esports Sdn. Bhd) and NetDragon Websoft Inc to establish a University Esports Cooperation Network providing corporate resource support to MMU Esport Club . To comprehensively enhance the competitive level, educational quality, and exchange standards of university Esports clubs by leveraging the VEA's tournaments and platforms alongside  professional resources. To promote the availability of Esports educational resources and AI courses. To help university Esports clubs improve their organisational and operational capabilities, fostering the long-term development of campus Esports.

2024 year was an incredible year which packed with thrilling adventures and achievements for our club.

We kicked off with the Mini Penang Dragonboat Race, showcasing teamwork and determination. Our hiking trip brought us closer to nature and each other, while the Melaka and Putrajaya Dragonboat Races highlighted our competitive spirit. At the Penang International Dragonboat Race, we proudly represented our club on an international stage. We also excelled in the Terengganu and Penang Indoor Rowing Races, pushing our limits on and off the water.

Beyond water sports, we completed the Seremban Half Marathon, celebrating endurance and unity.

Finally, we marked our club’s 15th Anniversary Dinner with joy and gratitude, reflecting on a year of camaraderie and growth.

Here's to more milestones ahead! 🐲🔥

59.72s — New PB ⚡️

Proud of this crew. We’ll be back stronger. 🐉🔥

Melaka Race 2023 🐉 

On the 2nd of July our team participated in a dragon boat race that was held at Melaka river. After weeks of training, we finally got to test our strength and endurance. It was a good experience for our team, especially to the new recruits as it was their first race. 

We would like to thank our seniors and @roguemalayadbt for their warm support and encouragement.

We would also like to thank our club advisor, @mr_zulmeteor and his family for coming and supporting us throughout the race.

Finally would like to thank the organizers of the event for providing us a chance to participate in the race.

Rowing is fun!!👀🙌
Before and after comparison of Penang Rowing International Championship 2024 of our team members.😆 We will come back stronger💪💪

GRAND CULTURAL FESTIVAL (GCF) MELAKA RIVER 2019 KAYAK SPRINT

On 30th of November, MMU Water Sports Club sent 5 teams of male and 2 teams of female participants to take part in the kayak sprint 300m which was held by Melaka River & Coastal Development Coperation (PPSPM) at Melaka River Cruise. 
There were many teams from other states had taken part in this event such as  X Paddlers, UITM, ALAM, Muar Ledang, Barracuda Canoe, KL Team, Sabah and etc. After many rounds of highly competitive races, our teams managed to get a few achievements:
Kayak Sprint 300m female category - Champion (Ng Kim Woon & Chua Jie Nee) and 4th place (Sandra Kerk Jia Hui & Onn An Chie) 
Kayak Sprint 300m male category - 2nd runner up (Johakim bin Jamaluddin & Chee Yong En) 
Congrats to all winners! This was the first kayak sprint event for all our participants and it was a good exposure for them other from dragon boat. 
Last but not least, thank you @mr_zulmeteor  @yongyin_yy for giving us advice and guidance during training. Thank you to all juniors for coming to support their teammates throughout the race.

Good morning dragons🐲
Lets flash back some memorable day🔥
On 2018, MMU Dragon Boat Team had achieved the champion of 12 Crew International Mix Team Open in Bali International Dragon Boat Festival 2018🥇

On December of the 2018, Our AUG MMU Dragon Boat Team who representative of Malaysia Team in traditional dragon boat race to participate our ASEAN University Games 2018 in Myanmar 🇲🇲 🔥They are a strong team ever , they train hard as a team for preparation before the AUG. Although they can’t managed to got first three places on the competition but they tried their best and did a great job. They are the athletes from the traditional dragon boat race and always the champion in our heart ❤️

On 2019, our MMU junior mixed team which achieving the gold under mixed juniors category 🥇🔥 Everyone of them had put more than 100% into the race, sweat and tears in all the journey of the preparation of the race, it had definitely paid off and no any sense of regret. 

Those are the strong and good MMU Team Dragon Boat rowers on our big family. Although this year we can’t participate any dragon boat race due to the Covid pandemic but we are still fully prepared for the future time and keep training by virtual 💪🏿🔥 

Come join us if you are interested, we have some virtual training for dragon boat training in this new semester and it would definitely fun to you and no regret 😛🔥🐲

MMU dragon boat team had their physical training recently at @crossfitmelaka_fittrek . Everyone of them had tried their very best in completing the trainings prepared for them. It was definitely not an easy task but everyone worked their best and push beyond their limits in order to improve! All of them had a really great experience and gained valuable knowledge for training in fittrek! Many thanks for giving us this opportunity. Thank you coach @yongyin_yy for all the guidance you provide along the way. It is sincerely appreciated.

Feeling motivated for workouts but no one to accompany/ coach you? Worry not, this studio is here for you! With proper equipments, professional trainers and specialized trainings for individuals, fittrek is definitely the best choice for you💪🏽. Do check out on @crossfitmelaka_fittrek for more info!! #nopainnogain

That's a wrap for our 10th Year Anniversary Dinner!! First and foremost, it was an honour to have the President of Multimedia University, Prof. Datuk. Ts. Dr. Ahmad Rafi bin Mohamed Eshaq, Campus Director, Dr. Mohd Rizal bin Abdul Razak and Director of Student Affairs Division, Dr. Abdullah Sallehhuddin bin Abdullah Salim in our anniversary dinner. We couldn't describe more how much we appreciate your presence and support in our event. 
Moreover, we would also like thank all of Water Sports Club members who came especially alumni for taking your time to travel to Melaka to come to this dinner. Thank you for your endless support throughout these 10 years. Thanks to all MMU staffs for your support and sponsorship. 
I believe that all of us feel touched during the event especially when we were watching the video and singing Gemuruh and Permata Dunia. It was really wonderful and encouraging to see everyone while singing Permata Dunia. 🐲Paddle together. Sing together. Laugh together. Cry together. Joke together. One team. One heart. One beat. 🐲 
See you all again Dragons! Until next time! 🤙🏼

🌟［CLSM_RD28］寻光之旅 • 黑暗中看见光
当光芒隐去，你是否仍愿踏上这趟温柔却震撼人心的旅程？
放下双眼的依赖，用心灵去“看”见生活，用双手去“触”摸感动。
这是一场关于感知、觉察与理解的沉浸体验，也是一次向社会弱势群体靠近的温暖实践。
你将体验盲人障碍挑战、感官互动活动、深度交流分享，与来自四面八方的伙伴携手同行，
在黑暗中寻找希望的微光，在陌生中建立真挚的连结。
✨在这一日，黑暗将成为理解的入口，光明将由你自己点亮。
我们不只是在体验，更是在感受生命不同的可能。

📅 日期：30/08/2025（星期六）
🕘 时间：9.00 a.m. – 10.30 p.m.
📍 地点：多媒体大学（马六甲院校）
💰报名费用：RM30（单人）｜RM56（双人）

🌟【CLSM_RD28] The Light Quest: One-Day Camp
When the lights go out, will you still choose to move forward with courage and heart?
to “see” life through the heart, to “feel” hope with your hands, and to rediscover the meaning of perception and empathy.
This is not just an experience; it’s a journey that opens your mind, touches your soul, and brings you closer to those often overlooked.

You'll take part in obstacle challenges, sensory-based activities, and heartfelt sharing sessions,
walking side by side with peers from all walks of life,
finding the light of connection in the dark, and illuminating understanding in unfamiliar paths.

✨ For one day, let darkness become the doorway to awareness —and let the light be something you create from within.
We’re not just learning — we’re growing, giving, and connecting.

📅 Date: 30th August 2025 (Saturday)
🕘 Time: 9:00 a.m. – 10:30 p.m.
📍 Venue: Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)
💰 Registration Fee: RM30 (Single) | RM56 (Pair)

📌 Registration Form:https://forms.gle/fdL8jAtq2iwVCACs8

[CLSM_RD29] 华文学会康乐股“将将好”会员聚会🀄️
 
你是否觉得大学生活总是三点一线，少了那么一点火花？🔥 还是觉得内心的热情无处安放，正想寻找志同道合的伙伴呢？
 
配合新学期的开始，我们为你准备了一个可以卸下学业压力、尽情欢笑的空间。没有生疏的客套，只有最真挚的交流。无论你是刚入会的新面孔，还是陪伴已久的老朋友，这里都有属于你的那个座位。我们准备了趣味横生的破冰游戏，打破僵局，让你迅速结识志趣相投的灵魂，让我们在欢笑中分享校园生活的点滴，遇见志同道合的知己。

[CLSM_RD29]Recreational Division of Chinese Language Society: ”GAM GAM HOU“ Member Gathering 🀄️
 
Do you feel like your university life is stuck in a repetitive loop, missing that spark of excitement? 🔥 Or perhaps you have a passion burning within and are looking for like-minded friends to share it with?
 
To kick off the new semester, we’ve created a space where you can toss aside your academic stress and laugh to your heart‘s content. No awkward formalities—only the most sincere connections. Whether you’re a fresh face joining us for the first time or a long-time member, there is a seat reserved just for you.
 
We’ve prepared fun-filled ice-breaking games to bridge the gap and help you connect with kindred spirits. Let’s share the little moments of campus life through laughter and find true friendship in every encounter.
 
Details of the ”GAM GAM HOU“ Member Gathering are as follows:

Location: FOB MAMR 2014
Fee: Free entry

May awareness continue, may understanding grow, and may the light reach more hearts.See you again in our next journey. ✨

[CLSM_RD27] 随着时代的不断进步，生活压力逐渐增长，许多人陷入困境，其中也包括大多数非营利组织。它们面临着经济和资源等方面的挑战。为了帮助缓解部分社会问题，多媒体大学（马六甲分校）华文学会第二十七届康乐股将举办“义赏中秋”：慈善市集，以鼓励现代年轻人深入了解并协助解决当今社会的挑战。“义赏中秋”：慈善市集融合了当今最新的趋势，同时也致力于慈善事业。市集的主要目标是支持面临困境的慈善机构，如孤儿院、老人院和猫狗中心，以改善社会中弱势群体的基本生活需求。慈善市集将积极招募摊主，提供平台让他们贩卖商品、食物，并进行商品宣传等活动。此外，市集还是一个让孤儿或老人展示自己手艺的平台，他们通过展示手艺所得到的所有收入将全额归属于他们自己。通过以更新颖的方式进行慈善活动，让现代学生们踊跃参与慈善活动，从而提升本次活动的意义。

“义赏中秋”：慈善市集详情如下： 
日期：10/09/2024 - 12/09/2024 (星期二至星期四）
时间：10.00 a.m. - 4.00 p.m.
地点：多媒体大学 (马六甲院校) 大礼堂

[CLSM_RD27]As times continue to progress, the pressures of life are gradually increasing, leaving many people in difficult situations, including most non-profit organizations. They face challenges in terms of economy and resources. To help alleviate some social problems, the 27th Recreational Division of Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) will be hosting “REUNION”: Charity Bazaar to encourage modern young people to understand and assist in solving today's social challenges.“REUNION”: Charity Bazaar integrates the latest trends while being dedicated to charity. The main goal of the bazaar is to support charitable institutions in difficulty, such as orphanages, nursing homes, and animal shelters, to improve the basic living needs of vulnerable groups in society. The Charity Bazaar will actively recruit vendors, providing a platform for them to sell goods and food, and to promote their products through various activities. Additionally, the bazaar will serve as a platform for orphans or elderly individuals to showcase their crafts, with all the income earned from these displays going directly to them. We will also conduct fundraising on campus and charge rent from vendors, with all the funds raised being donated to charitable institutions in need.
By conducting charitable activities in a more innovative way, we aim to encourage 
modern students to actively participate in charity work, thereby enhancing the significance of this event.

Details of "REUNION" : Charity Bazaar:
Date: 10/9/2024 - 12/09/2024 (Tuesday to Thursday)
Time: 10.00 a.m. - 4.00 p.m.
Venue: Main Hall, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM_RD27] 第二十七届康乐股在近日参观了流浪狗收留中心。看到这些无家可归的狗狗们，我们深刻体会到它们的脆弱与渴望。工作人员的关爱和努力让我感受到人类对动物的责任感。当中，我们也体验了和狗狗们一起制作了手工艺品，这些手工艺品也会被售卖，其中的收入将用于帮助园区。在此，希望更多人关注流浪动物，参与救助行动。

[CLSM_RD27] 27th Recreational Division recently had visited a stray dog shelter. Seeing these homeless dogs, we deeply understand their vulnerability and longing. We are also making handicrafts with the dogs. These handicrafts will also be sold, and the profits will be used to financially support the shelter. Hence, we hope that more people will pay attention to stray animals and participate in rescue jobs.

[CLSM_RD27] 随着时代的不断进步，生活压力逐渐增长，许多人陷入困境，其中也包括大多数非营利组织。它们面临着经济和资源等方面的挑战。为了帮助缓解部分社会问题，多媒体大学（马六甲分校）华文学会第二十七届康乐股将举办“义赏中秋”：慈善市集，以鼓励现代年轻人深入了解并协助解决当今社会的挑战。“义赏中秋”：慈善市集融合了当今最新的趋势，同时也致力于慈善事业。市集的主要目标是支持面临困境的慈善机构，如孤儿院、老人院和猫狗中心，以改善社会中弱势群体的基本生活需求。慈善市集将积极招募摊主，提供平台让他们贩卖商品、食物，并进行商品宣传等活动。此外，市集还是一个让孤儿或老人展示自己手艺的平台，他们通过展示手艺所得到的所有收入将全额归属于他们自己。通过以更新颖的方式进行慈善活动，让现代学生们踊跃参与慈善活动，从而提升本次活动的意义。

“义赏中秋”：慈善市集详情如下： 
日期：10/09/2024 - 12/09/2024 (星期二至星期四）
时间：10.00 a.m. - 4.00 p.m.
地点：多媒体大学 (马六甲院校) 大礼堂

[CLSM_RD27]As times continue to progress, the pressures of life are gradually increasing, leaving many people in difficult situations, including most non-profit organizations. They face challenges in terms of economy and resources. To help alleviate some social problems, the 27th Recreational Division of Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) will be hosting “REUNION”: Charity Bazaar to encourage modern young people to understand and assist in solving today's social challenges.“REUNION”: Charity Bazaar integrates the latest trends while being dedicated to charity. The main goal of the bazaar is to support charitable institutions in difficulty, such as orphanages, nursing homes, and animal shelters, to improve the basic living needs of vulnerable groups in society. The Charity Bazaar will actively recruit vendors, providing a platform for them to sell goods and food, and to promote their products through various activities. Additionally, the bazaar will serve as a platform for orphans or elderly individuals to showcase their crafts, with all the income earned from these displays going directly to them. We will also conduct fundraising on campus and charge rent from vendors, with all the funds raised being donated to charitable institutions in need.
By conducting charitable activities in a more innovative way, we aim to encourage 
modern students to actively participate in charity work, thereby enhancing the significance of this event.

Details of "REUNION" : Charity Bazaar:
Date: 10/9/2024 - 12/09/2024 (Tuesday to Thursday)
Time: 10.00 a.m. - 4.00 p.m.
Venue: Main Hall, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

On 21st May 2025, the MMU Buddhist Society had the honour of hosting Venerable Nyaninda for our BS Confession: Dhamma Sharing.✨🙏

In this sharing session, Venerable guided us to deeply reflect on the nature of thoughts💭 — ❓how they arise, how they affect our minds, and how we can become aware of and observe them through the wisdom of the Dhamma.🧐

Thank you to every participant for attending. 💛

Let us continue to practice the Dhamma in daily life by observing our thoughts, 
so that we can keep our minds from being carried away by the ups and downs of life.🪷

🌙 RAMADHAN SWEET CHARITY 🌙

Together We Share, Together We Care

⸻

💖 Infak Kasih | 7 March

At the masjid, we begin with service and sincerity. We clean the sacred space together, then cook side by side to prepare meals for the community. Through simple acts done with pure intention, we transform effort into charity — because together we share, together we care.

⸻

🍽 Iftar Jamaie | 7 March

As the sun sets, MMU Melaka students and the surrounding local community gather to break fast as one. Sharing food, prayers, and conversations, we celebrate unity and gratitude — a reminder that Ramadhan is most beautiful when experienced together.

⸻

🤝 Tautan Kasih | 8 March

Held at an orphanage, this day is about giving time and attention. We clean, connect, and share moments of laughter before breaking fast together. In these simple moments, bonds are formed and hearts are touched, reminding every child that they are not alone.

⸻

🌌 Singgah Sahur | 9 March

In the quiet hours before dawn, kindness continues its journey. Volunteers distribute sahur meals to those in need, ensuring no one begins their fast in hunger or solitude. A silent act of compassion that proves care does not sleep.

⸻

💛 Every act counts. Every moment matters.
Together we share, together we care… together we scan the QR to give.

🔥 KONVENSYEN SILAT CEKAK PUSAKA HANAFI 🔥
Alhamdulillah, Konvensyen Silat Cekak Pusaka Hanafi telah berlangsung dengan jayanya pada 18 Januari 2026 bertempat di University Multimedia, Melaka.

Konvensyen ini menghimpunkan ahli-ahli silat Cekak Pusaka Hanafi dari seluruh Zon Selatan, hasil kerjasama erat antara Majlis Perguruan & Persilatan (MPP) bersama Majlis Persilatan Negeri-Negeri (MPN) Zon Selatan.

Program ini bukan sekadar perhimpunan, tetapi menjadi medan mengukuhkan ukhuwah, disiplin serta semangat mempertahankan warisan seni persilatan Melayu yang berteraskan jati diri dan adab.

Semoga usaha ini terus menyuburkan legasi persilatan untuk generasi akan datang.

[PEMBUBARAN AHLI JAWATAN KUASA PSSCPUH 2023/2024] 

Pada tanggal 5 Disember 2024 telah berlangsungnya Mesyuarat Agung Tahunan kali ke-24. Dalam majlis tersebut telah berlakunya pelantikan ahli jawatankuasa baharu bagi sesi 2024/2025 sekaligus menandakan tamatnya perkhidmatan ahli jawatankuasa PSSCPUH MMU Melaka bagi sesi 2023/2024. 

Kami ingin mengucapkan ribuan terima kasih kepada PSSCPUH MMU Melaka kerana telah memberikan kami peluang untuk menabur bakti dalam Seni Silat Cekak Pusaka Ustaz Hanafi.

Kepada rakan-rakan seperjuangan yang bakal menggantikan kami, tahniah dan selamat maju jaya kami ucapkan kepada anda semua. Semoga terus maju dan menjalankan tugas dengan penuh amanah semasa anda berkhidmat.

Assalamualaikum warahmatullahi wabarakatuh 🌙

Alhamdulillah, the Iftar Jamaie event was successfully held and filled with warmth, unity, and meaningful moments. We are truly grateful to everyone who attended and to all volunteers and contributors who gave their time, effort, and support to make this gathering possible.

Your presence brought joy, strengthened our bond as a community, and reminded us of the beauty of sharing blessings during this special time. Moments like these create memories that stay in our hearts and inspire us to continue spreading kindness and togetherness.

May every contribution, big or small, be rewarded with endless blessings. Thank you for being part of this meaningful event. We hope to meet again in our future programs, insyaAllah. 🤍

Warm regards, 
Institusi Usrah MMU Melaka
April 25 CSRW Preperation🚀✨

🌙 RAMADHAN SWEET CHARITY 🌙

Together We Share, Together We Care

⸻

💖 Infak Kasih | 7 March

At the masjid, we begin with service and sincerity. We clean the sacred space together, then cook side by side to prepare meals for the community. Through simple acts done with pure intention, we transform effort into charity — because together we share, together we care.

⸻

🍽 Iftar Jamaie | 7 March

As the sun sets, MMU Melaka students and the surrounding local community gather to break fast as one. Sharing food, prayers, and conversations, we celebrate unity and gratitude — a reminder that Ramadhan is most beautiful when experienced together.

⸻

🤝 Tautan Kasih | 8 March

Held at an orphanage, this day is about giving time and attention. We clean, connect, and share moments of laughter before breaking fast together. In these simple moments, bonds are formed and hearts are touched, reminding every child that they are not alone.

⸻

🌌 Singgah Sahur | 9 March

In the quiet hours before dawn, kindness continues its journey. Volunteers distribute sahur meals to those in need, ensuring no one begins their fast in hunger or solitude. A silent act of compassion that proves care does not sleep.

⸻

💛 Every act counts. Every moment matters.
Together we share, together we care… together we scan the QR to give.

As representatives of the MMUFC community and Multimedia University students, we extend our heartfelt support to Faisal Halim during this challenging time. His well-being and swift recovery are paramount to us, and our thoughts and prayers are with him and his loved ones.

We stand united in condemning the unfortunate incident involving Faisal Halim and echo the call for accountability and justice. As members of the football community, we uphold the values of respect, sportsmanship, and fair play, and we expect nothing less from those involved in the sport.

Faisal Halim has our full support, and we trust that the Football Association of Malaysia (FAM) and the relevant authorities will conduct a thorough investigation to ensure that those responsible are held accountable. 

Together, as a community, let us rally behind Faisal Halim and demonstrate our unwavering solidarity. We wish him strength and courage during his recovery process and look forward to seeing him back on the field doing what he loves.

Adam Adnan
MMUFC's President

安静、敏捷、又带点神秘感，每一个瞬间都充满惊喜。
用镜头捕捉它们的细节与光影，让这些小生命成为画面主角。

不只是拍摄，本次活动也会带你走近守宫，了解它们的生活习性。
在轻松的氛围中拍摄与互动，近距离感受这些小生命的独特魅力，也是一次结合观察与创作的体验。

Unbothered little stars spotted⚠️—Gecko Photography Experience is here!

This time, our Photography Class has invited a few charismatic little stars—geckos 🦎

Calm, agile, and slightly mysterious, every moment with them is full of surprises. Capture their details, lighting, and textures through your lens, and turn these often-overlooked creatures into the true highlights of your shots.

More than just photography, this activity also gives you a chance to get closer to geckos and learn about their habits. In a relaxed setting, you’ll be able to photograph and interact with them, experiencing their unique charm up close—an experience that blends observation with creativity.

Ready to join this 「Project: Gecko Capture」 experience? 📸

Gaigai 计划，是一次用脚步与镜头认识彼此的小旅行。我们把看到的、感受到的，都存进了记忆卡里。
 
在城市里雨中漫步，在街口互拍，体验被财富包围的快乐； 捕捉地铁的速度、城市的节奏、巴刹的色彩，还有那道特别的彩虹。 

来看看摄影班小伙伴在旅途中捕捉到的瞬间吧！ ✨📸

Gaigai Trip — a little journey where footsteps and lenses helped us to know each other.

We stored everything we saw and felt into our memory cards —
Rainy city walks, taking portraits at street corners, experiencing the joy of being “surrounded by wealth”;
capturing the speed of the MRT, the rhythm of the city, the colors of the pasar, and that unexpected rainbow.

Come take a look at the moments our photography buddies captured on this little journey! ✨📸

马六甲，这个课本中频频出现的名字📚，远不止是一段历史的注脚👣。它是马六甲海峡，是东方的十字路口，是东西方文化的交汇地，更是风情万种的南洋小镇。这里承载了无数传奇故事与文化印记📖，一步一景，都是值得捕捉的瞬间。

当书上的知识真实地展现在眼前，历史便从文字跃然成影像🎥。马六甲的古城街巷、绚丽的彩色建筑、熙攘的文化市场，每一处都能让你感受到时光交织的韵味😚👌🏼。让我们的镜头，带你一同捕捉那些熟悉却又令人心生敬畏的画面，完成属于你的教育闭环♾️。

不管走到哪里，生活中从不缺少美景，而这次活动将带你发现更深层次的美。无需专业设备❌，只要一颗热爱记录的心❤️‍🔥，便能在马六甲这片迷人的土地上留下属于你的珍贵画面。

📅 *日期：* 2024年12月15日（星期日）
⏱️ *时间：* 上午8点至晚上11点
🚌 *交通：* MMU巴士
🏰 *地点：* 马六甲
💰 *费用：* RM12 / 人

名额有限，快点击链接锁定属于你的拍摄席位！💺
🖇️ https://forms.gle/HY9jAKTko7TBzEN39

每一张照片🖼️，都是一段故事；每一次快门，都是一次探索🔍。带上你的相机，让我们一起出发🏃🏽‍♀️💨，用影像铭刻这片风情独特的土地🏕️！

Malacca, a place name often found in history books📚, is much more than a footnote in history👣. It is the Straits of Malacca, the crossroads of the Orient, the meeting place of Eastern and Western cultures, and a southern city with a lot of flavour. It is a place of countless legendary stories and cultural vestiges📖, and every step of the way is a moment worth cherishing.

When the knowledge in the book is actually displayed before you, history will leap from words to images🎥. 🙋🏻‍♀️🔊勇者们，听我令！

在青春的战场上，疯狂蔓延，我们将崛起为被选中者，特种兵！我们不是普通人，我们是特种兵🥷🏻怀揣着青春的热情，我们踏上了一场前所未有的怡保《 特种兵之旅 》。这不仅仅是打卡景点，更是点燃激情的烈焰😼🫰🏻

那么你🫵🏻，准备好了吗⁉️ 用汗水和笑声，我们将书写自己的传奇！我们的行程每一刻都充实到爆炸，因为每一秒都至关重要💥⏳如果我们不是特种兵，那么还能是谁呢？

 ⌇ 特种兵手册 ⌇
📆 日期： 2024年8月24日
🕔 时间： 凌晨5点至傍晚11点半
🗺️ 地点： Starbees集合 -> 怡保
🎫 报名费： RM19

勇敢的特种兵们，让我们振臂一呼🙌🏻，一同前进，征服怡保的每一个角落；用我们的脚步来衡量怡保的美丽👣， 用我们的镜头记录每一个难忘的瞬间🤳🏻，并成为传奇中的传奇！这就是我们的《 特种兵之旅 》，不疯魔不成活！冲就完了，因为没有什么能够阻挡我们前进的步伐😤勇者们，我们前进吧💃🏻

Here’s Event Details: 
📅 Date: 25th May 2024 (Saturday) 
🕑 Time: 2pm - 10pm 
🗺 Location: Batu Caves → Bukit Antarabangsa 
💰 Registration Fee: RM12/person 

Reminders :
📌 As Batu Caves is a Hindu religious site, members must dress appropriately to respect the religious customs. Failure to do so may require purchasing sarongs for entry.
❌ Please refrain from wearing shorts, short skirts or tight-fitting clothing.
🌞 Remember to bring sunscreen and enough water when you go out, so you‘ll be all radiant and protected.
🐒 Be aware of monkeys! Please safeguard your belongings and maintain a safe distance.
🤫 Avoid loud noises and disruptions to respect  the devotees and customs.

Relax and recharge your ”batteries“ 🔋

《人文摄影比赛：时间的印记》 — 投票通道正式开启！

正如镜头能捕捉瞬间，人文摄影亦能记录着时间的印记。欢迎来到我们的线上人文摄影比赛，这里汇聚了许多充满情感与故事的视觉艺术品！现在，是时候展现你们的投票力量，为那些承载着人生片段的作品点赞了！

每一张参赛作品都是摄影师在日常生活中捕捉到的感人瞬间。他们用镜头记录着生活的美好，记录着时间流逝的痕迹。在这些作品中，你或许能找到共鸣，感受到陌生人的喜怒哀乐，被故事深深打动。

现在轮到你成为最重要的评委了！请点击下方链接进入投票页面，为你心仪的作品投上宝贵的一票。这是你为他们奉献的最佳方式，同时也是对摄影师们的鼓励和认可。

投票方式：
-点击链接进入多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会摄影班面子书页面：https://www.facebook.com/clsphotographypage
-在页面上欣赏所有参赛作品，细细品味其中的情感与故事。
-选择你最喜欢的作品，在作品下方点赞（一个赞一分）。
-你可以投票给多张作品，但每张作品只能投一次。

投票时间：13/9/2023 - 17/9/2023

《Humanistic Photography competition: Imprints of Time》 - Voting channel is open now!

Just as the lens captures moments, humanity photography also records the impressions of time. Welcome to our online humanity photography contest, where numerous emotionally charged visual artworks are gathered! Now is the time to show your voting power and give a thumbs-up to those works that carry fragments of life!

Each participating work is a touching moment captured by photographers in their daily lives. They use the lens to record the beauty of life and the traces of time passing by. In these works, you may find resonance, feel the joys and sorrows of strangers, and be deeply moved by their stories.

Now it's your turn to become the most important judge! 
-Please click on the link below to enter the voting page of the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) Photography Class Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/clsphotographypage 
-On the page, appreciate all the participating works and savour the emotions and stories behind them. 
-Choose your favourite works and give them a like (one like equals one vote) below the works. 
-You can vote for multiple works, but each work can only be voted for once. 

Voting period: 13/9/2023 - 17/9/2023

经过激烈角逐，我们的线上人文摄影比赛终于迎来了最为期待的时刻！在这个感动与故事充盈的摄影之旅中，每一位参赛者都倾注了心血，用镜头讲述了属于自己的人生片段。

感谢大家的积极参与，让我们一起来欣赏得奖者们的作品吧！📸

除了所有参赛的摄影师，我们也要由衷感谢所有支持本次比赛的观众们。是你们的热情参与和投票，让这场人文摄影之旅充满了无限的亮点和感动。感谢你们一直陪伴我们，一同见证了这场摄影盛宴的精彩。

比赛结束并不意味着摄影的故事就此终结，相反，这只是人文摄影艺术的新起点。我们鼓励每一位摄影爱好者继续捕捉美丽的瞬间，继续用镜头记录生活的点滴，将更多感动和情感分享给世界。

Through intense competition, our online humanity photography contest has finally reached the most anticipated moment! In this journey filled with emotions and stories, every participant has poured their heart and soul into capturing their own fragments of life through the lens.

We want to express our gratitude to everyone for their active participation. Let's now enjoy the works of the winners! 📸

In addition to all the participating photographers, we sincerely thank all the viewers who supported this contest. It is your enthusiastic participation and voting that have made this humanity photography journey full of infinite highlights and emotions. Thank you for being with us all along and witnessing the brilliance of this photography feast.

The end of the contest does not mean the end of photography stories; on the contrary, it marks a new beginning for the art of humanity photography. We encourage every photography enthusiast to continue capturing beautiful moments, recording the subtleties of life through the lens, and sharing more inspirations and emotions with the world.

🎶多媒体大学马六甲院校华乐团 2025 招新啦！ 🎶

想在大学生活里增添一份音乐的色彩？想结识志同道合的朋友，一起创造舞台上的美好回忆？那就快来加入 MMU马六甲院校华乐团 吧！
✨ 我们是谁？
我们是一群热爱中华传统音乐的大学生，致力于传承与创新华乐文化。无论你是有多年演奏经验，还是零基础的朋友，只要你热爱音乐，这里都有属于你的位置。
✨ 我们能给你什么？
🎵 华乐学习与训练
🎵 多元的表演机会（校内外演出、比赛、交流）
🎵 丰富多彩的大学生活体验
✨ 招收乐器：二胡、笛子、琵琶、古筝、扬琴、打击乐、低音乐器……以及更多！
没有乐器基础？没有乐器？没关系，我们也会提供学习与练习的机会！

📍 报名方式：扫描二维码或点击下方报名链接填写表单

✨ 大宝森节快乐！ ✨ 

在这个神圣而吉祥的大宝森节（Thaipusam），向所有人送上最诚挚的祝福。大宝森节是虔诚、感恩与自我反思的时刻，象征着正义战胜邪恶，以及信仰的强大力量

愿这一天带给您战胜挑战的勇气、指引前行的智慧，以及充满繁荣的未来。愿（Lord Murugan）的神圣恩典启发我们，以勇气、善良和团结的精神前行💪 

让我们借此机会珍惜毅力、谦逊和精神成长的价值观，这些正是大宝森节所象征的美好意义。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团祝愿大家大宝森节吉祥，充满祝福与喜悦！😆

✨ Happy Thaipusam! ✨

On this auspicious occasion of Thaipusam, we extend our heartfelt wishes to you. Thaipusam is a time for devotion, gratitude, and self-reflection, symbolizing the triumph of good over evil and the power of faith.

May this day grant you the strength to overcome challenges, the wisdom to guide your path, and abundant blessings for a prosperous future. May Lord Murugan’s divine grace inspire us all to walk with courage, kindness, and unity. 💪

Let us take this opportunity to embrace the values of perseverance, humility, and spiritual growth that Thaipusam so beautifully represents. 

Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chinese Orchestra Society wishes everyone a blessed and joyous Thaipusam! 😆

圣诞节一年只有一次，但每次来临都带来了喜悦。乐声环绕，烛光闪烁，钟声飘香远方，让幸福，安康，快乐，降临到你和家人朋友身旁🕊️。愿圣诞之夜的烛光，带给你温暖和芬芳🎉。圣诞节不是为了礼物🎁，更是为了提醒大家不要忘了爱与被爱💕。

在这辉煌快乐的圣诞佳节，多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团献上一切美好的祝福！祝大家一切顺心如意✨！愿你度过最美好的圣诞节！🎄🌟

May the glow of Christmas candles warm your heart and fill your days with happiness🎉. Beyond the gifts🎁, Christmas reminds us of the importance of love and being loved, a time to cherish the connections that truly matter💕. 

In this glorious and joyful Christmas season, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chienese Orchestra Society sends you heartfelt wishes for peace, joy, and a truly magical Christmas filled with laughter, love, and blessings. 🎄🌟

在斋戒月里,成年的穆斯林必须严格把斋,不吃不喝,不吸烟、不行房事等。直到太阳西沉, 人们才进餐,随后或消遣娱乐,或走亲访友,欢天喜地如同过年。穆斯林信徒们相信,这长达一个月的斋戒能洗涤心灵同时亲身体验穷人的生活以换取自身对惜福的意识。🌙

愿这神圣的斋月为你带来平安与喜悦，心灵得到净化，生活充满恩典。在此，多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华乐团愿你的每一天都洋溢着爱、希望与感恩，与家人朋友共度一个祥和、温馨的斋月🥰。

Awal Ramadhan is a time when Muslims around the world focus on prayer, fasting, giving to charity, and religious devotion. On Awal Muharram, Muslims in Malaysia attend mosque and start a month of fasting between sunrise and sunset. Beginning at puberty, all Muslims take part in the month-long dawn-to-sunset fast that is the hallmark of Ramadhan. They believe that fasting cleanses the body, and the practice reminds them of the suffering of the poor. 🌙

May this holy month of Ramadhan bring you peace and joy, purify your soul, and fill your life with blessings. The Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chinese Orchestra wishes you that each day be filled with love, hope, and gratitude, as you share a harmonious and warm Ramadhan with your family and friends🥰.

1957年8月31日，马来西亚开启了历史的新篇章，一个由自由与决心铸造的国家。67年来，我们承载着开国先贤的梦想，致力于建设一个以多样性为力量、以团结为根基的国家。从早期的独立斗争到国家建设的诸多挑战，我们的历史见证了民族的坚韧与不屈。在这个重要时刻，让我们缅怀前辈们的牺牲，并承诺为所有马来西亚人创造一个更加光明和包容的未来。在此，多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团衷心祝愿马来西亚国庆日快乐！

On August 31, 1957, Malaysia embarked on a new chapter in its history, a nation forged by freedom and determination. For 67 years, we have carried the dreams of our founding fathers, striving to build a country where diversity is our strength and unity is our foundation. From the early struggles for independence to the many challenges of nation-building, our history is a testament to the resilience and perseverance of our people. At this important moment, let us honor the sacrifices of those who came before us and commit to creating a brighter and more inclusive future for all Malaysians. On this occasion, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chinese Orchestra Society wishes Malaysia a Happy Independence Day!

【阡陌暖春Spring in Path】——24/25届多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团新生营 Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chinese Orchestra Society Freshies‘ Camp 24/25

古风传承，情景交融，带你穿越时光的帷幕！

作为24/25届华乐团的新生营，《阡陌暖春》将融合古风元素与剧情驱动的互动游戏，让每一位新生在愉悦的氛围中，感受华乐的深厚韵味与独特魅力。无论你是对华乐已有情结，还是刚刚踏上这段音符旅程，我们都欢迎你与我们一起，走进这场别开生面的春日盛会，开启属于你的音乐篇章！

With elements of ancient style and a plot-driven interactive experience Spring in Path invites every new member to immerse themselves in a world where music and story blend seamlessly. Whether you are already passionate about chinese orchestra or just starting your musical journey, we welcome you to join us in this unique and vibrant spring gathering, where you will begin your own musical chapter with us.

每年的9月16日，我们都会庆祝马来西亚日，这不仅仅是一个纪念我们国家成立的日子，更是一个庆祝我们团结与多元文化的日子。无论我们来自哪里，说什么语言，或者信仰什么宗教，我们都在这片美丽的土地上共同生活，彼此包容。让我们继续携手前行，尊重彼此的差异，珍惜彼此的友谊，为马来西亚的美好未来共同努力！🇲🇾 

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团愿我们的国家永远和平繁荣，团结一致，向前迈进。让我们一起为这个美丽的国家感到自豪！

“Every year on September 16th, we celebrate Malaysia Day, a day not only to commemorate the formation of our nation but also to honor our unity and diversity. Regardless of where we come from, what language we speak, or what faith we follow, we live together on this beautiful land, embracing each other‘s differences. Let us continue to move forward hand in hand, respecting our differences, cherishing our friendships, and working together for a brighter future for Malaysia! 🇲🇾 

Multimedia University（Melaka Campus）Chinese Orchestra Society may our country always remain peaceful, prosperous, and united.  Let’s be proud of this beautiful nation!

2024 MMUCOS Refine Training Camp《琢磨》 集训营

在这纷繁的世界里，我们以自身琢如磨，完善品性。我们内心时刻充盈着一股坚定的力量💪🏼，从不轻言放弃。正如“有匪君子，如切如磋，如琢如磨。”每一次的切磋、琢磨，都是自我的反省和提升的阶段。一旦成为真正的君子，我们将无畏无惧，哪怕道路崎岖曲折，我们的内心都会永远如同坚不可摧的岩石⛰️。《琢磨》令我们拥有了毅然站上舞台的底气，如同宝石般闪烁着内心的璀璨✨，在舞台上迸发出无限的能量。 

这是一场由多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团所举办的乐团集训营。我们在这里呼吁团员们踊跃出席此次集训营。让我们共同学习、共同成长，像石琢般磨练品德，磨练乐技，相互扶持，共同走向更高的巅峰。🤩🤩

❗️本次集训营只限于华乐团团员！这是一次绝对不能错过的机会！！！

虽然我们过着平淡的生活,但母爱却让这些日子闪闪发光。哪怕路途遥远，却能发现原来家最是温暖；哪怕阅人无数，一回头总能发现母亲的笑颜最是美丽。“爱”不用翻山越岭、“孝”无需漂洋过海，简单的日子有一份心意足矣。在这5月里，让我们用尽一生，来对妈妈诠释“爱”这个字。愿岁月温柔待你，爱你不及三千遍。💕

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团愿全天下的母亲平安喜乐，享受世间的浪漫与宠溺。祝各位母亲大人，母亲节快乐！！！💐

In our mundane lives, a mother’s love imbues each day with a special sparkle. No matter how far the journey, it‘s only when we find home that we feel the warmth, and no matter how many people we meet, it’s turning back to see our mother‘s smile, which is truly beautiful. ”Love“ doesn’t require scaling mountains, and filial piety doesn‘t need crossing seas; a simple gesture suffices in the everyday. This May, let us spend a lifetime defining ”love“ for our mothers. May the years be kind to you; loving you is not only three thousand times. 💕

Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chinese Orchestra Society extends warm wishes to all mothers worldwide, hoping for peace, joy, and the enjoyment of life’s romance. Happy Mother‘s Day to all the mothers out there!!! 💐

卫塞节是个神圣的日子，愿大家保持内心的安宁与平静，共同感受这有意义的一天。

多媒体大学（马六甲分校）华乐团祝愿大家生活充满美好的祝福与欢乐。🙏🏻祝所有佛教信徒们卫塞节快乐！✨

Wesak Day is a holy day. Let’s spend a special day wisely to grow our inner peaceful and joyful experiencing this meaningful day.

Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chinese Orchestra Society wishes everyone‘s life be filled with wonderful blessings and joy.🙏🏻Happy Wesak Day to all the Buddhist friends!✨

朝觐是穆斯林一段非凡的朝圣之旅，吸引了来自世界各地的数百万穆斯林，在这里展示他们强大的信仰和虔诚。这段旅程充满了历史和传统，象征着朝圣者对他们精神道路的深刻承诺。当他们聚集在麦加时，朝圣者们参与了数百年来一直进行的仪式，寻求和平、祝福和更深的信仰连接。这种卓越的团结和奉献提醒了我们人类共同追求意义和超越的精神。我们以真挚且诚恳的心态祝愿所有穆斯林哈芝节快乐。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校） 祝愿全体穆斯林朋友们哈芝节快乐！

Haji is an extraordinary pilgrimage that draws millions of people from around the world to unite in a powerful expression of faith and devotion. This journey is steeped in history and tradition, symbolizing the profound commitment of the pilgrims to their spiritual path. As they gather in Mecca, pilgrims engage in rituals that have been performed for centuries, seeking peace, blessings, and a deeper connection to their beliefs. This remarkable display of unity and dedication serves as a reminder of the shared human quest for meaning and transcendence. With sincere and heartfelt wishes, we extend our best greetings to all Muslims celebrating Haji.

Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) Chinese Orchestra Society wishes all Muslim friends Happy Hari Raya Haji!

[CLSM_IMD26] 股委们这次拍摄的影片的主题是勇气。新人从远方来，刚到MMU后不认识任何人，也没有朋友，所以羡慕拥有一大群朋友的人。他没有勇气认识朋友，参不进任何圈子，孤独寂寞，独来独往。某天某某社团分派传单，经过思考后决定参加社团活动，给自己一个机会认识朋友。经过活动发现大家都很好相处，愿意和他交流。从此更加积极的认识朋友，扩大朋友圈。

影片制作者：
李函洋
吴思慜
黄奕钧

[CLSM_IMD26] This video theme is about bravery. A new student has just arrived at MMU, not knowing anyone and having no friends. He envied people who had a large group of friends, but he did not have the courage to meet friends, could not participate in any circle, was lonely and solitary. One day a certain club distributed flyers, and after thinking about it, he decided to participate in the club activities to give himself a chance to meet friends. After the activity, he found that everyone was very nice and willing to communicate with him. Since then, he has been more active in meeting friends and expanding his circle of friends.

Video creator:
Brandon Lee Han Yang
Goh Shii Minn
Eng Yi Jun

【后学杯战报】
赛城多媒体大学辩论队在本届后学杯止步于12强，虽有遗憾，但这段旅程让我们收获良多。

特别恭喜张荧宸与罗心言在赛程中分别获得单场最佳辩手的荣誉，这是对他们努力与实力的肯定。

我们也特别感谢登嘉楼大学辩论队、亚太科技大学辩论队以及精英大学辩论队与我们进行友谊赛，让我们在备赛过程中获益匪浅。感谢一路上支持我们的老师、学长姐和队友们，我们会带着这份经验继续前行。

[Hou Xue Cup Update]
The MMU Cyberjaya Debate Team’s journey in the Hou Xue Cup ended at the Top 12. While it comes with some regret, the experience has been invaluable. 

Special congratulations to Cheng Yin Chen and Loh Xin Lan for being awarded as Best Debater in individual rounds, which is a recognition of their dedication and skills.

We would also like to extend our gratitude to the Universiti Malaysia Terengganu Debate Team, the APU Debate Team, and the HELP University Debate Team for engaging with us in friendly matches, which greatly enriched our preparation. We truly appreciate the support of our coaches, seniors, and teammates, and we will carry these lessons forward.

📣【10th Northern Malaysia Mandarin Debate Tournament｜Match Report】

From May 17 to 20, 2025, our team proudly represented Multimedia University in the 10th Northern Malaysia Mandarin Debate Tournament. Among many outstanding teams, we successfully advanced to the Top 8 and concluded our journey on a high note.

🙌 Our heartfelt thanks to the seniors who came in person to support and assist us during the competition. From strategic advice to emotional encouragement, your presence was a vital force that kept us going.

🤝 We also sincerely thank the university debate teams who helped us with the mock debate sessions before the competition.

💬 To every team member — thank you for standing by one another from preparation to the final match day. You supported each other through every discussion and encouraged each other before every match. Your mutual trust and cooperation were your strongest foundation, and the most valuable gain from this journey.

The competition may have ended, but our passion for debate will never end.

"Debate brings us together, and leads our way further."

在辩论中，质询和答盘是最具张力的攻防对决。质询是发现逻辑漏洞的关键环节，用精准的问题引导对手暴露弱点；答盘则是语言与逻辑的完美结合，用简洁而有力的回应为己方立场争取支持。

质询的锋芒，答盘的智慧，每一场辩论都在锤炼我们的逻辑思维与表达能力。无论是初学者想掌握基础，还是辩论爱好者追求突破，这里都是磨练技巧的最佳舞台。

In a debate, questioning and answering are the most tense offensive and defensive duels. Questioning is the key to discovering logical loopholes, using precise questions to guide the opponent to expose weaknesses; answering is the perfect combination of language and logic, using concise and powerful responses to gain support for one's own position.

The sharpness of questioning and the wisdom of answering, every debate is honing our logical thinking and expression skills. Whether you are a beginner who wants to master the basics, or a debate enthusiast pursuing a breakthrough, this is the best stage to hone your skills.

In a debate, argumentation and rebuttal are the core elements where the charm of language and the depth of thinking shine. Argumentation is the clear articulation of one’s stance, making the point more persuasive through structured reasoning; rebuttal, on the other hand, is a battle of wits, using precise logic to dismantle the opponent’s case and gain the upper hand. 

The power of argumentation and the ingenuity of rebuttal—every debate hones our skills in expression and logical thinking. Whether you are a beginner looking to master the basics of argumentation and rebuttal, or an experienced debater striving to elevate your performance, this is the perfect platform to refine your skills!

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）第二十九届华文学会理事会将开放招收三股一坊的股坊委。华文学会的三股一坊为文化文学股、资讯媒体股、康乐股以及微晶创作坊，有兴趣加入的多媒体大学（马六甲院校）在籍学生可到宣传柜台了解更多详情或填写线上申请表格。快来加入我们华文学会的大家庭！

股坊委招收宣传柜台详情如下：
日期：5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 （星期一至星期五）
时间：10.00 a.m. – 4.00 p.m.
地点：FIST 走廊

股坊委招收面试详情如下：
日期：5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 （星期一至星期五）
时间：8.00 p.m. - 10.30 p.m.
地点：CLC MSMX 2002

股坊委线上申请表格链接：https://forms.cloud.microsoft/r/AKu5a3U8wR

*备注：此线上表格仅开放至 2026 年 1 月 9日（星期五）下午 5 时，请有意者在截止日期前使用多媒体大学学生电邮填写此表格。

欲知更多详情，请联络：
颜毓雷 010-9696021
薛禹政 011-14393134
王佳璇 018-2011445

谢谢。

[CLSM] The 29th High Committee of Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) is now recruiting divisions’ committees of Cultural and Literature Division, Information and Multimedia Division, Recreational Division and Micros Song Composing Division. For those students of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) who are interested, kindly visit our booth to get further information or fill in the online application form. Come and join us now!

Details of Booth are as follows:
Date: 5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 (Monday to Friday)
Time: 10.00 a.m. – 4.00 p.m.
Venue: FIST Walkway

Details of Interview Sessions are as follows:
Date: 5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 (Monday to Friday)
Time: 8.00 p.m. – 10.30 p.m.
Venue: CLC MSMX 2002

Online application form’s link:https://forms.cloud.microsoft/r/AKu5a3U8wR

*Remarks: The online application form will only be available until 5.00 p.m., 9/1/2026 (Friday). Kindly use the Multimedia University student email to fill in the application form before the deadline if you are interested.

For further information, kindly contact:
Gan Yik Lei 010-9696021
See Yee Zhen 011-14393134
Ong Jia Xuan 018-2011445

镜头之下，世界不止一种模样；光影之间，故事正在悄然发生。📸

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会资讯媒体股，即将在2026年带来一系列精彩活动：
🎞 摄影交流会
🏆 线上摄影比赛
🌏 人文摄影一日游
📚 摄影班

无论你是摄影新手，还是热爱记录生活的创作者，这里都有属于你的一席之地。
让我们一起用镜头探索世界，用影像讲述故事。
敬请期待，我们与你不见不散。✨

欲知更多详情，请联络：
曾依琳 012 - 364 2520
蔡佳竣 013 - 803 8691

谢谢。

[CLSM_IMD29] Coming Soon · Activities Preview

Through the lens, the world reveals more than meets the eye. Between light and shadow, stories come alive. 📸

Information and Multimedia Division of the Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus), is bringing you a series of exciting photography-related activities in 2026:
🎞 Photography Sharing Session
🏆 Online Photography Competition
🌏 Cultural Photography Day Trip
📚 Photography Class

Whether you’re a beginner or a passionate storyteller, there‘s a place for you here. Let’s explore the world through our lenses and capture moments that matter.

Stay tuned, something exciting is on the way. ✨

For further information, kindly contact:
Eileen Chin 012 - 364 2520
Chou Jia Jun 013 - 803 8691

"[CLSM] 多媒体大学（马六甲院校）第二十九届华文学会理事会将开放招收三股一坊的股坊委。华文学会的三股一坊为文化文学股、资讯媒体股、康乐股以及微晶创作坊，有兴趣加入的多媒体大学（马六甲院校）在籍学生可到宣传柜台了解更多详情或填写线上申请表格。快来加入我们华文学会的大家庭！

股坊委招收宣传柜台详情如下：
日期：5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 （星期一至星期五）
时间：10.00 a.m. – 4.00 p.m.
地点：FIST 走廊

股坊委招收面试详情如下：
日期：5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 （星期一至星期五）
时间：8.00 p.m. - 10.30 p.m.
地点：CLC MSMX 2002

股坊委线上申请表格链接：https://forms.cloud.microsoft/r/AKu5a3U8wR

*备注：此线上表格仅开放至 2026 年 1 月 9日（星期五）下午 5 时，请有意者在截止日期前使用多媒体大学学生电邮填写此表格。

欲知更多详情，请联络：
颜毓雷 010-9696021
薛禹政 011-14393134
王佳璇 018-2011445

谢谢。

[CLSM] The 29th High Committee of Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) is now recruiting divisions’ committees of Cultural and Literature Division, Information and Multimedia Division, Recreational Division and Micros Song Composing Division. For those students of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) who are interested, kindly visit our booth to get further information or fill in the online application form. Come and join us now!

Details of Booth are as follows:
Date: 5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 (Monday to Friday)
Time: 10.00 a.m. – 4.00 p.m.
Venue: FIST Walkway

Details of Interview Sessions are as follows:
Date: 5/1/2026 - 9/1/2026 (Monday to Friday)
Time: 8.00 p.m. – 10.30 p.m.
Venue: CLC MSMX 2002

Online application form’s link:https://forms.cloud.microsoft/r/AKu5a3U8wR

*Remarks: The online application form will only be available until 5.00 p.m., 9/1/2026 (Friday). Kindly use the Multimedia University student email to fill in the application form before the deadline if you are interested.

Gan Yik Lei 010-9696021
See Yee Zhen 011-14393134

The posters attached below are the brief introduction of the judges for this competition. For those who are interested, you can follow their Instagram to know more about their works!

Theme: Warmth

[CLSM_IMD26] This video theme is about bravery. A new student has just arrived at MMU, not knowing anyone and having no friends. He envied people who had a large group of friends, but he did not have the courage to meet friends, could not participate in any circle, was lonely and solitary. One day a certain club distributed flyers, and after thinking about it, he decided to participate in the club activities to give himself a chance to meet friends. After the activity, he found that everyone was very nice and willing to communicate with him. Since then, he has been more active in meeting friends and expanding his circle of friends.

想在大学生活里增添一份音乐的色彩？想结识志同道合的朋友，一起创造舞台上的美好回忆？那就快来加入 MMU马六甲院校华乐团 吧！
✨ 我们是谁？
我们是一群热爱中华传统音乐的大学生，致力于传承与创新华乐文化。无论你是有多年演奏经验，还是零基础的朋友，只要你热爱音乐，这里都有属于你的位置。
✨ 我们能给你什么？
🎵 华乐学习与训练
🎵 多元的表演机会（校内外演出、比赛、交流）
🎵 丰富多彩的大学生活体验
✨ 招收乐器：二胡、笛子、琵琶、古筝、扬琴、打击乐、低音乐器……以及更多！
没有乐器基础？没有乐器？没关系，我们也会提供学习与练习的机会！

📅 招新时间：29/8/2025-5/9/2025
📍 报名方式：扫描二维码或点击下方报名链接填写表单

"DRvu-aykuKD", "caption": "🎶 多媒体大学马六甲院校华乐团 2025 招新啦！ 🎶

想让大学生活多一点音乐色彩？想遇见一群同样热爱音乐的伙伴，一起在舞台上留下难忘的足迹？那就别犹豫，立即加入 MMU马六甲院校华乐团 吧！

✨ 我们是谁？
我们是一群热爱中华传统音乐的大学生，致力于将华乐文化传承与发扬光大。无论你是拥有多年经验，还是完全零基础，只要你对音乐有兴趣，这里都欢迎你加入。

✨ 加入我们，你能得到：
🎵 华乐乐器学习机会与训练
🎵 各类表演与活动机会（校内外演出、比赛、交流）
🎵 精彩丰富、充满活力的大学生活体验

✨ 招收乐器：
二胡、笛子、琵琶、古筝、扬琴、打击乐、低音乐器等多种乐器
没有基础？没有乐器？别担心，我们同样提供学习与练习的平台！

📅 招新日期： 13/11/2025 - 5/12/2025
📍 报名方式： 扫描二维码或点击下方报名链接填写表单
💰费用：RM 30（RM 10入团费➕RM20新生营费）

快来加入我们，让音乐照亮你的大学生活！💫
特别提醒：现在加入华乐团，还可免费成为 MMU Roadrunners 会员，团员可同时享有两大组织的福利！

如有任何疑问，欢迎联系：
主席： 李翊潔 Lee Yi Jie — 018-772 2454

外务副主席： 林佳轩 Lim Jia Xuan — 013-566 8522

Want to add more musical color to your university life?
Looking to meet friends who share the same passion for music, and create unforgettable moments on stage together?
Then don’t hesitate — join the MMU Melaka Chinese Orchestra now!

🎵 Opportunities to learn and train in Chinese musical instruments
🎵 Chances to participate in various performances and events

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团祝愿大家大宝森节吉祥，充满祝福与喜悦！😆

✨ Happy Thaipusam! ✨

On this auspicious occasion of Thaipusam, we extend our heartfelt wishes to you. Thaipusam is a time for devotion, gratitude, and self-reflection, symbolizing the triumph of good over evil and the power of faith.

May this day grant you the strength to overcome challenges, the wisdom to guide your path, and abundant blessings for a prosperous future. May Lord Murugan’s divine grace inspire us all to walk with courage, kindness, and unity. 💪

Let us take this opportunity to embrace the values of perseverance, humility, and spiritual growth that Thaipusam so beautifully represents.

Awal Ramadhan is a time when Muslims around the world focus on prayer, fasting, giving to charity, and religious devotion. On Awal Muharram, Muslims in Malaysia attend mosque and start a month of fasting between sunrise and sunset. Beginning at puberty, all Muslims take part in the month-long dawn-to-sunset fast that is the hallmark of Ramadhan. They believe that fasting cleanses the body, and the practice reminds them of the suffering of the poor. 🌙

May this holy month of Ramadhan bring you peace and joy, purify your soul, and fill your life with blessings. "1957年8月31日，马来西亚开启了历史的新篇章，一个由自由与决心铸造的国家。67年来，我们承载着开国先贤的梦想，致力于建设一个以多样性为力量、以团结为根基的国家。从早期的独立斗争到国家建设的诸多挑战，我们的历史见证了民族的坚韧与不屈。在这个重要时刻，让我们缅怀前辈们的牺牲，并承诺为所有马来西亚人创造一个更加光明和包容的未来。在此，多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团衷心祝愿马来西亚国庆日快乐！

On August 31, 1957, Malaysia embarked on a new chapter in its history, a nation forged by freedom and determination. For 67 years, we have carried the dreams of our founding fathers, striving to build a country where diversity is our strength and unity is our foundation. From the early struggles for independence to the many challenges of nation-building, our history is a testament to the resilience and perseverance of our people. At this important moment, let us honor the sacrifices of those who came before us and commit to creating a brighter and more inclusive future for all Malaysians. 在这纷繁的世界里，我们以自身琢如磨，完善品性。我们内心时刻充盈着一股坚定的力量💪🏼，从不轻言放弃。正如“有匪君子，如切如磋，如琢如磨。”每一次的切磋、琢磨，都是自我的反省和提升的阶段。一旦成为真正的君子，我们将无畏无惧，哪怕道路崎岖曲折，我们的内心都会永远如同坚不可摧的岩石⛰️。《琢磨》令我们拥有了毅然站上舞台的底气，如同宝石般闪烁着内心的璀璨✨，在舞台上迸发出无限的能量。 

这是一场由多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华乐团所举办的乐团集训营。我们在这里呼吁团员们踊跃出席此次集训营。让我们共同学习、共同成长，像石琢般磨练品德，磨练乐技，相互扶持，共同走向更高的巅峰。🤩🤩

❗️本次集训营只限于华乐团团员！这是一次绝对不能错过的机会！！！

In this bustling world, we refine ourselves to perfect our character. Our hearts are always filled with a strong sense of determination 💪🏼, never willing to give up easily. Just like ”The superior man is like a cutter, sharp but gentle; like a grinder, firm but kind.“ Every refinement and contemplation is a stage of self-reflection and improvement. Once we become true gentlemen, we will fearlessly face any challenges. Even if the road is rough and winding, our hearts will remain as unyielding as a rock ⛰️. ”Refinement“ gives us the confidence to step onto the stage decisively, shining like a gem ✨, bursting with infinite energy.
This is a orchestra training camp organized by Multimedia University (Melaka campus) Chinese Orchestra Society. We call upon all members to actively participate in this training camp. Let us learn and grow together, refining our character and musical skills like polishing a stone, supporting each other, and striving towards greater heights together. 🤩🤩

❗️This training camp is only open to members of the Chinese Orchestra Society! This is an opportunity you absolutely cannot miss!!!

🪕 Provided: Transportation, attractive meals and accommodation
